• Show All Code
  • Hide All Code

FFT_SSVEP_analysis

Christopher

2 7 2024

Modelling of raw [CSD based] amplitude values from fft-based data via linear mixed models via standard anova models

library(lme4)
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(tidyverse)
library(afex)
library(broom)
library(apa)
library(kableExtra)
library(lmerTest)
library(pbkrtest)
library(effects)
library(visreg)
library(sjPlot)
library(broom.mixed)
library(pander)
library(mediation)
library(multcomp)
library(multcompView)
library(magrittr)
library(multipanelfigure)
library(ggbeeswarm)
library(lsmeans)
library(BayesFactor)
library(ggpubr)
library(gpairs)
library(DescTools)
library(cowplot)
library(ggpol)
library(logspline)

source('C:/Dropboxdata/Dropbox/work/R-statistics/general_functions/RainCloudPlots/tutorial_R/R_rainclouds.R')
source('C:/Dropboxdata/Dropbox/work/R-statistics/general_functions/RainCloudPlots/tutorial_R/R_rainclouds.R')

source('C:/Dropboxdata/Dropbox/work/R-statistics/examples/Bayesian_rank-based_hypothesis_testing/rankBasedCommonFunctions.R')
source('C:/Dropboxdata/Dropbox/work/R-statistics/examples/Bayesian_rank-based_hypothesis_testing/rankSumSampler.R') # Wilcoxon rank sum function
source('C:/Dropboxdata/Dropbox/work/R-statistics/examples/Bayesian_rank-based_hypothesis_testing/signRankSampler.R') # Wilcoxon signed-rank function
source('C:/Dropboxdata/Dropbox/work/R-statistics/examples/Bayesian_rank-based_hypothesis_testing/spearmanSampler.R')# Spearman's rho function




# broad cluster
# CSD based normalized to pre-cue baseline in %
#  
DATAPath = "data_in/FFT_Amp_data_largeclust_06-14-2024_13-19.csv"
t_baseline = c(-1000, 0)


# broad cluster | smaller central cluster
# CSD based normalized to pre-cue baseline in %
#  
# DATAPath = "data_in/FFT_Amp_data_largeclust_06-24-2024_15-43.csv"
# t_baseline = c(-1000, 0)


# broad cluster | smaller central cluster
# CSD based normalized to pre-cue baseline in %
# for changed experiment starting with participant 22: isoluminant stimuli and lower flicker frequencies
#  
DATAPath = "data_in/FFT_Amp_data_largeclust_allsubs_08-30-2024_11-21.csv"
t_baseline = c(-1000, 0)


# broad cluster | larger central cluster |
# peri: not correct!
# CSD based normalized to pre-cue baseline in %
# for changed experiment starting with participant 22: isoluminant stimuli and lower flicker frequencies
#  
# DATAPath = "data_in/FFT_Amp_data_pericenter_allsubs_07-02-2024_11-46.csv"
# t_baseline = c(-1000, 0)
# 
# broad cluster | very broad central cluster
# CSD based normalized to pre-cue baseline in %
# for changed experiment starting with participant 22: isoluminant stimuli and lower flicker frequencies
# # 
# DATAPath = "data_in/FFT_Amp_data_largecenterclust_allsubs_09-11-2024_14-45.csv"
# t_baseline = c(-1000, 0)



#!!!!!!! relevant
# broad cluster | larger central cluster as in Tango study | peri both clusters but smaller
# CSD based normalized to pre-cue baseline in %
# for changed experiment starting with participant 22: isoluminant stimuli and lower flicker frequencies
DATAPath = "data_in/FFT_Amp_data_CenterTangoStudyPeriSmall_05-23-2025_11-56.csv"
t_baseline = c(-1000, 0)

# broad cluster | larger central cluster as in Tango study | peri only center
# DATAPath = "data_in/FFT_Amp_data_TangoStudyPeriOnlyCenter_11-25-2024_14-17.csv"
# t_baseline = c(-1000, 0)

# # broad cluster | larger central cluster as in Tango study | peri only lateral | in this study shows gain for attended
# DATAPath = "data_in/FFT_Amp_data_TangoStudyPeriOnlyLateral_11-25-2024_14-17.csv"
# t_baseline = c(-1000, 0)


#!!!!!!!


# replication relevant
# broad cluster | larger central cluster as in Tango study | peri both clusters as in Tango study
# CSD based normalized to pre-cue baseline in %
# for changed experiment starting with participant 22: isoluminant stimuli and lower flicker frequencies
# DATAPath = "data_in/FFT_Amp_data_TangoStudy_05-23-2025_11-53.csv"
# t_baseline = c(-1000, 0)


# exploratory | induced removed as in FShiftAlpha
# broad cluster | larger central cluster as in Tango study | peri both clusters but smaller
# CSD based normalized to pre-cue baseline in %
# for changed experiment starting with participant 22: isoluminant stimuli and lower flicker frequencies
# DATAPath = "data_in/FFT_Amp_data_CenterTangoStudyPeriSmall_indremov08-15-2025_13-50.csv"
# t_baseline = c(-1000, 0)



options(scipen=1, digits=7)

Prepare data


  1. Read in data:
  • data_in/FFT_Amp_data_CenterTangoStudyPeriSmall_05-23-2025_11-56.csv
  • with pre-cue [-1000, 0] ms


sub_sample = c(0)
# sub_sample = as.factor(c(26,30, 31,37, 38)) # no ssvep people discarded
sub_sample = as.factor(c(42)) # low trial number


# read in data
DataIn <- read.csv(DATAPath, sep = ";") %>%
  mutate(subjects = as.factor(subjects))%>%
  filter(!subjects %in% sub_sample)
head(DataIn)
str(DataIn)

Illustrate SSVEP Data

1b Illustrate Data as is | center RDKs

plot differently


#evoked raw#### for center

dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="center") %>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time=='[0.5 1.5] ', RDK_colorlum == 'isolum__to_bckgrd')
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'subjects', 'time', 'RDK_isattended'. You
## can override using the `.groups` argument.
# set limits
yax_limits <- c( min(dat2plot$modulation_evoked), max(dat2plot$modulation_evoked))
yax_limits <- round(yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.1)
yax_limits <- yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.1


theme_set(theme_bw())
plot1 <- ggplot(dat2plot, aes(x = RDK_isattended, y = modulation_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(subjects,time)),colour = "grey60",alpha = 1,size =0.5) +
  geom_beeswarm(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = RDK_isattended,
                    group = RDK_isattended), cex=3, size = 5,alpha=1,fill="grey40",shape=21)+
  # geom_point(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended),
  #                   group = RDK_isattended), size = 4,alpha=0.4)+
  stat_summary(fun.y=mean, aes(ymin=..y.., ymax=..y.., color =RDK_isattended), geom='errorbar', width=0.9, size=1.5) +
  scale_x_discrete("RDK_isattended", breaks=waiver(), labels = rep(c(""),1,2)) +
  # theme(legend.position="bottom") +
  ylab(expression(paste("amplitude modulation in %")))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  #  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_fill_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  theme(legend.position="none")+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)


plot2 <- ggplot(dat2plot, aes(y = modulation_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended, x = 1)) +
  geom_flat_violin(aes(fill = RDK_isattended),position = position_nudge(x = .1, y = 0), 
                   adjust = 1.3, trim = FALSE, alpha = 1, colour = NA)+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  # scale_fill_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_fill_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank())+
  theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank())+
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)



# cowplot::plot_grid(plot1, plot2, plot3, ncol = 3,labels = "AUTO")
plotttitle <- ggdraw() + 
  draw_label("SSVEP mod. | evoked \ncentral RDKs | isoluminant to background", fontface='bold', size = 10)
plotplots <- ggarrange(plot1, plot2,ncol = 2,common.legend = TRUE,align = "h", widths=c(3,1))

savefig <- multi_panel_figure(columns = 1, rows = 1, panel_label_type = "none", width = 3.5, height = 5, unit = "in")
saveplot <- ggarrange(plotttitle, plotplots, nrow = 2, heights=c(0.2, 1))

savefig %<>%
  fill_panel(saveplot, column = 1, row = 1)
savefig

# save_multi_panel_figure(savefig, "figures/FFT_BeeSwarm_Mod_ALPHA_COL_34subs.eps")



dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="center") %>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked), subtraction_evoked = mean(subtraction_evoked))%>%
  filter(time=='[0.5 1.5] ', RDK_colorlum == 'isolum__to_bckgrd')
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'subjects', 'time', 'RDK_isattended'. You
## can override using the `.groups` argument.
# set limits
yax_limits <- c( min(dat2plot$subtraction_evoked), max(dat2plot$subtraction_evoked))
# yax_limits <- round(yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.1)
yax_limits <- yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.2
# # yax_limits <- c(-27, 15)

theme_set(theme_bw())
plot1 <- ggplot(dat2plot, aes(x = RDK_isattended, y = subtraction_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(subjects,time)),colour = "grey60",alpha = 1,size =0.5) +
  geom_beeswarm(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = RDK_isattended,
                    group = RDK_isattended), cex=3, size = 5,alpha=1,fill="grey40",shape=21)+
  # geom_point(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended),
  #                   group = RDK_isattended), size = 4,alpha=0.4)+
  stat_summary(fun.y=mean, aes(ymin=..y.., ymax=..y.., color =RDK_isattended), geom='errorbar', width=0.9, size=1.5) +
  scale_x_discrete("RDK_isattended", breaks=waiver(), labels = rep(c(""),1,2)) +
  # theme(legend.position="bottom") +
  ylab(expression(paste("amplitude diff in muV/cm²")))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  #  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_fill_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  theme(legend.position="none")+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)


plot2 <- ggplot(dat2plot, aes(y = subtraction_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended, x = 1)) +
  geom_flat_violin(aes(fill = RDK_isattended),position = position_nudge(x = .1, y = 0), 
                   adjust = 1.3, trim = FALSE, alpha = 1, colour = NA)+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  # scale_fill_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_fill_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank())+
  theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank())+
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)



# cowplot::plot_grid(plot1, plot2, plot3, ncol = 3,labels = "AUTO")
plotttitle <- ggdraw() + 
  draw_label("SSVEP diff. | evoked \ncentral RDKs | isoluminant to background", fontface='bold', size = 10)
plotplots <- ggarrange(plot1, plot2,ncol = 2,common.legend = TRUE,align = "h", widths=c(3,1))

savefig <- multi_panel_figure(columns = 1, rows = 1, panel_label_type = "none", width = 3.5, height = 5, unit = "in")
saveplot <- ggarrange(plotttitle, plotplots, nrow = 2, heights=c(0.2, 1))

savefig %<>%
  fill_panel(saveplot, column = 1, row = 1)
savefig

# save_multi_panel_figure(savefig, "figures/FFT_BeeSwarm_Mod_ALPHA_COL_34subs.eps")

1c Illustrate Data as is | center RDKs separate for experimental conditions | only isoluminant

plot differently


#evoked raw#### for center

# set overall limits?
dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="center", RDK_colorlum=="isolum__to_bckgrd") %>%
  mutate(condition_label = case_when(
    condition %in% c(1,2) ~ "peri_AttUnatt",
    condition %in% c(3,4) ~ "peri_AttIrrel",
    condition %in% c(5,6) ~ "peri_UnattIrrel"
  ))%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, condition_label)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time=='[0.5 1.5] ')
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'subjects', 'time', 'RDK_isattended'. You
## can override using the `.groups` argument.
# set limits
yax_limits <- c( min(dat2plot$modulation_evoked), max(dat2plot$modulation_evoked))
yax_limits <- round(yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.1)
yax_limits <- yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.1
# # yax_limits <- c(-27, 15)

theme_set(theme_bw())
plot1 <- ggplot(dat2plot, aes(x = RDK_isattended, y = modulation_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(subjects,time)),colour = "grey60",alpha = 1,size =0.5) +
  geom_beeswarm(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = RDK_isattended,
                    group = RDK_isattended), cex=3, size = 5,alpha=1,fill="grey40",shape=21)+
  # geom_point(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended),
  #                   group = RDK_isattended), size = 4,alpha=0.4)+
  stat_summary(fun.y=mean, aes(ymin=..y.., ymax=..y.., color =RDK_isattended), geom='errorbar', width=0.9, size=1.5) +
  scale_x_discrete("RDK_isattended", breaks=waiver(), labels = rep(c(""),1,2)) +
  facet_grid(.~condition_label)+
  # theme(legend.position="bottom") +
  ylab(expression(paste("amplitude modulation in %")))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  #  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_fill_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  theme(legend.position="none")+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)


plot2 <- ggplot(dat2plot, aes(y = modulation_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended, x = 1)) +
  geom_flat_violin(aes(fill = RDK_isattended),position = position_nudge(x = .1, y = 0), 
                   adjust = 1.3, trim = FALSE, alpha = 1, colour = NA)+
  facet_grid(.~condition_label)+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  # scale_fill_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_fill_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank())+
  theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank())+
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)



# cowplot::plot_grid(plot1, plot2, plot3, ncol = 3,labels = "AUTO")
plotttitle <- ggdraw() + 
  draw_label("SSVEP mod. | evoked \ncentral RDKs | luminance offset", fontface='bold', size = 10)
plotplots <- ggarrange(plot1, plot2,ncol = 2,common.legend = TRUE,align = "h", widths=c(3,1))

savefig <- multi_panel_figure(columns = 1, rows = 1, panel_label_type = "none", width = 6, height = 5, unit = "in")
saveplot <- ggarrange(plotttitle, plotplots, nrow = 2, heights=c(0.2, 1))

savefig %<>%
  fill_panel(saveplot, column = 1, row = 1)
savefig

# save_multi_panel_figure(savefig, "figures/FFT_BeeSwarm_Mod_ALPHA_COL_34subs.eps")

1b ad1 Illustrate Data as is | center RDKs

some trouble shooting…plot both RDKs


#evoked raw#### for center

# set overall limits?
dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="center") %>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum, RDK_id)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked), subtraction_evoked = mean(subtraction_evoked))%>%
  filter(time=='[0.5 1.5] ', RDK_colorlum == 'isolum__to_bckgrd')
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'subjects', 'time', 'RDK_isattended',
## 'RDK_colorlum'. You can override using the `.groups` argument.
# set limits
yax_limits <- c( min(dat2plot$modulation_evoked), max(dat2plot$modulation_evoked))
yax_limits <- round(yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.1)
yax_limits <- yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.2


theme_set(theme_bw())
ggplot(dat2plot, aes(x = RDK_isattended, y = modulation_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(subjects,time)),colour = "grey60",alpha = 1,size =0.5) +
  geom_beeswarm(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = RDK_isattended,
                    group = RDK_isattended), cex=3, size = 5,alpha=1,fill="grey40",shape=21)+
  # geom_point(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended),
  #                   group = RDK_isattended), size = 4,alpha=0.4)+
  stat_summary(fun.y=mean, aes(ymin=..y.., ymax=..y.., color =RDK_isattended), geom='errorbar', width=0.9, size=1.5) +
  scale_x_discrete("RDK_isattended", breaks=waiver(), labels = rep(c(""),1,2)) +
  # theme(legend.position="bottom") +
  facet_grid(.~RDK_id)+
  ylab(expression(paste("amplitude modulation in %")))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  #  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_fill_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  theme(legend.position="none")+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)

# set limits
yax_limits <- c( min(dat2plot$subtraction_evoked), max(dat2plot$subtraction_evoked))
yax_limits <- round(yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.1)
yax_limits <- yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.2


theme_set(theme_bw())
ggplot(dat2plot, aes(x = RDK_isattended, y = subtraction_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(subjects,time)),colour = "grey60",alpha = 1,size =0.5) +
  geom_beeswarm(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = RDK_isattended,
                    group = RDK_isattended), cex=3, size = 5,alpha=1,fill="grey40",shape=21)+
  # geom_point(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended),
  #                   group = RDK_isattended), size = 4,alpha=0.4)+
  stat_summary(fun.y=mean, aes(ymin=..y.., ymax=..y.., color =RDK_isattended), geom='errorbar', width=0.9, size=1.5) +
  scale_x_discrete("RDK_isattended", breaks=waiver(), labels = rep(c(""),1,2)) +
  # theme(legend.position="bottom") +
  facet_grid(.~RDK_id)+
  ylab(expression(paste("amplitude diff in muV/cm²")))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  #  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_fill_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  theme(legend.position="none")+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)

# set overall limits?

dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="center") %>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum, RDK_id, condition)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked), subtraction_evoked = mean(subtraction_evoked))%>%
  filter(time=='[0.5 1.5] ', RDK_colorlum == 'isolum__to_bckgrd')
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'subjects', 'time', 'RDK_isattended',
## 'RDK_colorlum', 'RDK_id'. You can override using the `.groups` argument.
yax_limits <- c( min(dat2plot$subtraction_evoked), max(dat2plot$subtraction_evoked))
yax_limits <- round(yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.1)
yax_limits <- yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.2


theme_set(theme_bw())
ggplot(dat2plot, aes(x = condition, y = subtraction_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(subjects,time)),colour = "grey60",alpha = 1,size =0.5) +
  geom_beeswarm(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = condition,
                    group = condition), cex=3, size = 4,alpha=1,fill="grey40",shape=21)+
  # geom_point(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended),
  #                   group = RDK_isattended), size = 4,alpha=0.4)+
  stat_summary(fun.y=mean, aes(ymin=..y.., ymax=..y.., color =RDK_isattended), geom='errorbar', width=0.9, size=1.5) +
  scale_x_discrete("RDK_isattended", breaks=waiver(), labels = rep(c(""),1,2)) +
  # theme(legend.position="bottom") +
  facet_grid(.~RDK_id)+
  ylab(expression(paste("amplitude diff in muV/cm²")))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  #  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_fill_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  theme(legend.position="none")+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)

dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="center") %>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum, RDK_id, condition)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked), subtraction_evoked = mean(subtraction_evoked))%>%
  filter(time=='[0.5 1.5] ', RDK_colorlum == 'isolum__to_bckgrd')
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'subjects', 'time', 'RDK_isattended',
## 'RDK_colorlum', 'RDK_id'. You can override using the `.groups` argument.
yax_limits <- c( min(dat2plot$modulation_evoked), max(dat2plot$modulation_evoked))
yax_limits <- round(yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.1)
yax_limits <- yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.2


theme_set(theme_bw())
ggplot(dat2plot, aes(x = condition, y = modulation_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(subjects,time)),colour = "grey60",alpha = 1,size =0.5) +
  geom_beeswarm(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = condition,
                    group = condition), cex=3, size = 4,alpha=1,fill="grey40",shape=21)+
  # geom_point(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended),
  #                   group = RDK_isattended), size = 4,alpha=0.4)+
  stat_summary(fun.y=mean, aes(ymin=..y.., ymax=..y.., color =RDK_isattended), geom='errorbar', width=0.9, size=1.5) +
  scale_x_discrete("RDK_isattended", breaks=waiver(), labels = rep(c(""),1,2)) +
  # theme(legend.position="bottom") +
  facet_grid(.~RDK_id)+
  ylab(expression(paste("modulation in %")))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  #  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_fill_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  theme(legend.position="none")+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)

# corrdata <- DataIn %>%
#   mutate(sign_modulation = sign(modulation_evoked), sign_subtraction=sign(subtraction_evoked) )
# 
# ggscatter(corrdat3, 
#           x = "POS", 
#           y = "POS_X_COL", 
#           size = 2,
#           palette = "jco",
#           add = "reg.line",
#           conf.int = TRUE) +
#   # stat_cor(aes(color = con_RDK_col_attended), method = "spearman", label.y = 60) +
#   stat_cor( method = "spearman") +
#   # stat_cor(aes(color = con_RDK_col_attended), method = "pearson", label.y = 60) + 
#   ggtitle("Spearman Rank Correlations | amplitude modulations separate for pos.")

2a Illustrate Data as is | peri RDKs


#evoked raw#### for center
dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="peri") %>%
  filter(RDK_ispresented=="presented")%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'subjects', 'time', 'RDK_isattended'. You
## can override using the `.groups` argument.
theme_set(theme_bw())
ggplot(dat2plot, aes(x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended), y = amplitude_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended)) +
  # geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(subjects,RDK_isattended)),colour = "grey60",alpha = 0.5,size =0.5) +
  geom_beeswarm(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended),
                    group = RDK_isattended), cex=2, size = 4,alpha=1,fill="grey40",shape=21)+
  # geom_point(aes(color = condition, x = interaction(time,condition),
  #                   group = condition), size = 4,alpha=0.4)+
  stat_summary(fun.y=mean, aes(ymin=..y.., ymax=..y.., color =RDK_isattended), geom='errorbar', width=0.9, size=1.5) +
  scale_x_discrete("time windows in s", breaks=waiver(), labels = rep(c("[-1 0]","[0.5 1.5]","[1 2]"),1,9)) +
  facet_grid(.~RDK_colorlum)+
  theme(legend.position="bottom") +
  ylab(expression(paste("amplitude in muV")))+
  labs(title=sprintf("SSVEP amplitudes | evoked"),
       subtitle="collapsed across frequencies")+
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2")

theme_set(theme_bw())
ggplot(dat2plot, aes(x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended), y = modulation_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended)) +
  # geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(subjects,RDK_isattended)),colour = "grey60",alpha = 0.5,size =0.5) +
  geom_beeswarm(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended),
                    group = RDK_isattended), cex=2, size = 4,alpha=1,fill="grey40",shape=21)+
  # geom_point(aes(color = condition, x = interaction(time,condition),
  #                   group = condition), size = 4,alpha=0.4)+
  stat_summary(fun.y=mean, aes(ymin=..y.., ymax=..y.., color =RDK_isattended), geom='errorbar', width=0.9, size=1.5) +
  scale_x_discrete("time windows in s", breaks=waiver(), labels = rep(c("[-1 0]","[0.5 1.5]","[1 2]"),1,9)) +
  facet_grid(.~RDK_colorlum)+
  theme(legend.position="bottom") +
  ylab(expression(paste("modulation in %")))+
  labs(title=sprintf("SSVEP amplitudes | evoked"),
       subtitle="collapsed across frequencies")+
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2")

2b Illustrate Data as is | peri RDKs

plot differently


#evoked raw#### for periphery
# general ylims
dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="peri") %>%
  filter(RDK_ispresented=="presented")%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time=='[0.5 1.5] ', RDK_colorlum == 'isolum__to_bckgrd')
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'subjects', 'time', 'RDK_isattended'. You
## can override using the `.groups` argument.
# set limits
yax_limits <- c( min(dat2plot$modulation_evoked), max(dat2plot$modulation_evoked))
yax_limits <- round(yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.1)
# yax_limits <- yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.2
# yax_limits <- c(-27, 15)


theme_set(theme_bw())
plot1 <- ggplot(dat2plot, aes(x = RDK_isattended, y = modulation_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(subjects,time)),colour = "grey60",alpha = 1,size =0.5) +
  geom_beeswarm(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = RDK_isattended,
                    group = RDK_isattended), cex=3, size = 5,alpha=1,fill="grey40",shape=21)+
  # geom_point(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended),
  #                   group = RDK_isattended), size = 4,alpha=0.4)+
  stat_summary(fun.y=mean, aes(ymin=..y.., ymax=..y.., color =RDK_isattended), geom='errorbar', width=0.9, size=1.5) +
  scale_x_discrete("RDK_isattended", breaks=waiver(), labels = rep(c(""),1,3)) +
  # theme(legend.position="bottom") +
  ylab(expression(paste("amplitude modulation in %")))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#F1831A", "#293C4A", "#198A83"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#F1831A", "#293C4A", "#198A83"))+
  theme(legend.position="none")+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)


plot2 <- ggplot(dat2plot, aes(y = modulation_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended, x = 1)) +
  geom_flat_violin(aes(fill = RDK_isattended),position = position_nudge(x = .1, y = 0), 
                   adjust = 1.3, trim = FALSE, alpha = 1, colour = NA)+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#F1831A", "#293C4A", "#198A83"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#F1831A", "#293C4A", "#198A83"))+
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank())+
  theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank())+
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)



# cowplot::plot_grid(plot1, plot2, plot3, ncol = 3,labels = "AUTO")
plotttitle <- ggdraw() + 
  draw_label("SSVEP mod. | evoked \nperi RDKs | isoluminant to background", fontface='bold', size = 10)
plotplots <- ggarrange(plot1, plot2,ncol = 2,common.legend = TRUE,align = "h", widths=c(3,1))

savefig <- multi_panel_figure(columns = 1, rows = 1, panel_label_type = "none", width = 4, height = 5.5, unit = "in")
saveplot <- ggarrange(plotttitle, plotplots, nrow = 2, heights=c(0.2, 1))

savefig %<>%
  fill_panel(saveplot, column = 1, row = 1)
savefig

# save_multi_panel_figure(savefig, "figures/FFT_BeeSwarm_Mod_ALPHA_COL_34subs.eps")



dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="peri") %>%
  filter(RDK_ispresented=="presented")%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  summarise(subtraction_evoked=mean(subtraction_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time=='[0.5 1.5] ', RDK_colorlum == 'isolum__to_bckgrd')
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'subjects', 'time', 'RDK_isattended'. You
## can override using the `.groups` argument.
# set limits
yax_limits <- c( min(dat2plot$subtraction_evoked), max(dat2plot$subtraction_evoked))
# yax_limits <- round(yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.1)
yax_limits <- yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.2
# yax_limits <- c(-27, 15)


theme_set(theme_bw())
plot1 <- ggplot(dat2plot, aes(x = RDK_isattended, y = subtraction_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(subjects,time)),colour = "grey60",alpha = 1,size =0.5) +
  geom_beeswarm(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = RDK_isattended,
                    group = RDK_isattended), cex=3, size = 5,alpha=1,fill="grey40",shape=21)+
  # geom_point(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended),
  #                   group = RDK_isattended), size = 4,alpha=0.4)+
  stat_summary(fun.y=mean, aes(ymin=..y.., ymax=..y.., color =RDK_isattended), geom='errorbar', width=0.9, size=1.5) +
  scale_x_discrete("RDK_isattended", breaks=waiver(), labels = rep(c(""),1,3)) +
  # theme(legend.position="bottom") +
  ylab(expression(paste("amplitude diff in muV/cm²")))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#F1831A", "#293C4A", "#198A83"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#F1831A", "#293C4A", "#198A83"))+
  theme(legend.position="none")+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)


plot2 <- ggplot(dat2plot, aes(y = subtraction_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended, x = 1)) +
  geom_flat_violin(aes(fill = RDK_isattended),position = position_nudge(x = .1, y = 0), 
                   adjust = 1.3, trim = FALSE, alpha = 1, colour = NA)+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#F1831A", "#293C4A", "#198A83"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#F1831A", "#293C4A", "#198A83"))+
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank())+
  theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank())+
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)



# cowplot::plot_grid(plot1, plot2, plot3, ncol = 3,labels = "AUTO")
plotttitle <- ggdraw() + 
  draw_label("SSVEP diff. | evoked \nperi RDKs | isoluminant to background", fontface='bold', size = 10)
plotplots <- ggarrange(plot1, plot2,ncol = 2,common.legend = TRUE,align = "h", widths=c(3,1))

savefig <- multi_panel_figure(columns = 1, rows = 1, panel_label_type = "none", width = 4, height = 5.5, unit = "in")
saveplot <- ggarrange(plotttitle, plotplots, nrow = 2, heights=c(0.2, 1))

savefig %<>%
  fill_panel(saveplot, column = 1, row = 1)
savefig

# save_multi_panel_figure(savefig, "figures/FFT_BeeSwarm_Mod_ALPHA_COL_34subs.eps")

2c Illustrate Data as is | peri RDKs

plot all conditions


#evoked raw#### for periphery
dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="peri") %>%
  filter(RDK_ispresented=="presented")%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended2, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time=='[0.5 1.5] ', RDK_colorlum == 'isolum__to_bckgrd')
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'subjects', 'time', 'RDK_isattended2'. You
## can override using the `.groups` argument.
# set general limits
yax_limits <- c( min(dat2plot$modulation_evoked), max(dat2plot$modulation_evoked))
yax_limits <- round(yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.1)
# yax_limits <- yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.2
# yax_limits <- c(-27, 15)

theme_set(theme_bw())
plot1 <- ggplot(dat2plot, aes(x = RDK_isattended2, y = modulation_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(subjects,time)),colour = "grey60",alpha = 1,size =0.5) +
  geom_beeswarm(aes(color = RDK_isattended2, x = RDK_isattended2,
                    group = RDK_isattended2), cex=2, size = 5,alpha=1,fill="grey40",shape=21)+
  # geom_point(aes(color = RDK_isattended2, x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended),
  #                   group = RDK_isattended2), size = 4,alpha=0.4)+
  stat_summary(fun.y=mean, aes(ymin=..y.., ymax=..y.., color =RDK_isattended2), geom='errorbar', width=0.9, size=1.5) +
  scale_x_discrete("RDK_isattended2", breaks=waiver(), labels = rep(c(""),1,6)) +
  # theme(legend.position="bottom") +
  ylab(expression(paste("amplitude modulation in %")))+
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  theme(legend.position="none")+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)

plot2 <- ggplot(dat2plot, aes(y = modulation_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended2, x = 1)) +
  geom_flat_violin(aes(fill = RDK_isattended2),position = position_nudge(x = .1, y = 0), 
                   adjust = 1.3, trim = FALSE, alpha = 1, colour = NA)+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank())+
  theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank())+
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)



# cowplot::plot_grid(plot1, plot2, plot3, ncol = 3,labels = "AUTO")
plotttitle <- ggdraw() + 
  draw_label("SSVEP mod. | evoked \nperi RDKs | isoluminant to background", fontface='bold', size = 10)
plotplots <- ggarrange(plot1, plot2,ncol = 2,common.legend = TRUE,align = "h", widths=c(3,1))

savefig <- multi_panel_figure(columns = 1, rows = 1, panel_label_type = "none", width = 6, height = 6, unit = "in")
saveplot <- ggarrange(plotttitle, plotplots, nrow = 2, heights=c(0.2, 1))

savefig %<>%
  fill_panel(saveplot, column = 1, row = 1)
savefig

# save_multi_panel_figure(savefig, "figures/FFT_BeeSwarm_Mod_ALPHA_COL_34subs.eps")


###
# plot difference
####
dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="peri") %>%
  filter(RDK_ispresented=="presented")%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended2, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  summarise(subtraction_evoked=mean(subtraction_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time=='[0.5 1.5] ', RDK_colorlum == 'isolum__to_bckgrd')
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'subjects', 'time', 'RDK_isattended2'. You
## can override using the `.groups` argument.
# set general limits
yax_limits <- c( min(dat2plot$subtraction_evoked), max(dat2plot$subtraction_evoked))
# yax_limits <- round(yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.1)
yax_limits <- yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.2
# yax_limits <- c(-27, 15)

theme_set(theme_bw())
plot1 <- ggplot(dat2plot, aes(x = RDK_isattended2, y = subtraction_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(subjects,time)),colour = "grey60",alpha = 1,size =0.5) +
  geom_beeswarm(aes(color = RDK_isattended2, x = RDK_isattended2,
                    group = RDK_isattended2), cex=2, size = 5,alpha=1,fill="grey40",shape=21)+
  # geom_point(aes(color = RDK_isattended2, x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended),
  #                   group = RDK_isattended2), size = 4,alpha=0.4)+
  stat_summary(fun.y=mean, aes(ymin=..y.., ymax=..y.., color =RDK_isattended2), geom='errorbar', width=0.9, size=1.5) +
  scale_x_discrete("RDK_isattended2", breaks=waiver(), labels = rep(c(""),1,6)) +
  # theme(legend.position="bottom") +
  ylab(expression(paste("amplitude diff in muV/cm²")))+
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  theme(legend.position="none")+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)

plot2 <- ggplot(dat2plot, aes(y = subtraction_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended2, x = 1)) +
  geom_flat_violin(aes(fill = RDK_isattended2),position = position_nudge(x = .1, y = 0), 
                   adjust = 1.3, trim = FALSE, alpha = 1, colour = NA)+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank())+
  theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank())+
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)



# cowplot::plot_grid(plot1, plot2, plot3, ncol = 3,labels = "AUTO")
plotttitle <- ggdraw() + 
  draw_label("SSVEP amp difference | evoked \nperi RDKs | isoluminant to background", fontface='bold', size = 10)
plotplots <- ggarrange(plot1, plot2,ncol = 2,common.legend = TRUE,align = "h", widths=c(3,1))

savefig <- multi_panel_figure(columns = 1, rows = 1, panel_label_type = "none", width = 6, height = 6, unit = "in")
saveplot <- ggarrange(plotttitle, plotplots, nrow = 2, heights=c(0.2, 1))

savefig %<>%
  fill_panel(saveplot, column = 1, row = 1)
savefig

# save_multi_panel_figure(savefig, "figures/FFT_BeeSwarm_Mod_ALPHA_COL_34subs.eps")

2d Illustrate Data as is | peri RDKs

plot all conditions in combination they were actually presented


#evoked raw#### for periphery
dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  mutate(condition2 = case_when(
    (condition == 1 | condition == 2) ~ "peri_att_unatt",
    (condition == 3 | condition == 4) ~ "peri_att_irrel",
    (condition == 5 | condition == 6) ~ "peri_unatt_irrel",
  )) %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="peri") %>%
  filter(RDK_ispresented=="presented")%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum, condition2)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time=='[0.5 1.5] ')
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'subjects', 'time', 'RDK_isattended',
## 'RDK_colorlum'. You can override using the `.groups` argument.
dat2plot2 <- dat2plot %>%
  filter(RDK_colorlum == 'isolum__to_bckgrd')


theme_set(theme_bw())
ggplot(dat2plot2, aes(x = RDK_isattended, y = modulation_evoked, fill = RDK_isattended)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(subjects,time)),colour = "grey60",alpha = 1,size =0.5) +
  geom_beeswarm(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = RDK_isattended,
                    group = RDK_isattended), cex=3, size = 5,alpha=1,fill="grey40",shape=21)+
  # geom_point(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended),
  #                   group = RDK_isattended), size = 4,alpha=0.4)+
  stat_summary(fun.y=mean, aes(ymin=..y.., ymax=..y.., color =RDK_isattended), geom='errorbar', width=0.9, size=1.5) +
  scale_x_discrete("RDK_isattended", breaks=waiver(), labels = rep(c(""),1,3)) +
  # theme(legend.position="bottom") +
  facet_grid(.~condition2)+
  ylab(expression(paste("amplitude mod in %")))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#F1831A", "#293C4A", "#198A83"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#F1831A", "#293C4A", "#198A83"))+
  labs(title=sprintf("SSVEP modulations | evoked | peri RDKs | isoluminant"),
       subtitle="collapsed across frequencies")

  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))

3a Illustrate Data as is | peri and center | general modulation

plot differently


#evoked raw#### for center

# set overall limits?
dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_ispresented=="presented", RDK_colorlum=="isolum__to_bckgrd")%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_position2)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time == '[0.5 1.5] ')
## `summarise()` has grouped output by 'subjects', 'time'. You can override using
## the `.groups` argument.
# set limits
yax_limits <- c( min(dat2plot$modulation_evoked), max(dat2plot$modulation_evoked))
yax_limits <- round(yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.1)
yax_limits <- yax_limits + c(-1, 1)*diff(yax_limits)*0.1


theme_set(theme_bw())
plot1 <- ggplot(dat2plot, aes(x = RDK_position2, y = modulation_evoked, fill = RDK_position2)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_line(aes(group = interaction(subjects,time)),colour = "grey60",alpha = 1,size =0.5) +
  geom_beeswarm(aes(color = RDK_position2, x = RDK_position2,
                    group = RDK_position2), cex=3, size = 5,alpha=1,fill="grey60",shape=21)+
  # geom_point(aes(color = RDK_isattended, x = interaction(time,RDK_isattended),
  #                   group = RDK_isattended), size = 4,alpha=0.4)+
  stat_summary(fun.y=mean, aes(ymin=..y.., ymax=..y.., color =RDK_position2), geom='errorbar', width=0.9, size=1.5) +
  scale_x_discrete("RDK position", breaks=waiver(), labels = rep(c(""),1,2)) +
  # theme(legend.position="bottom") +
  ylab(expression(paste("amplitude modulation in %")))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("seagreen", "plum4"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("seagreen", "plum4"))+
  #  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_fill_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  theme(legend.position="none")+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)


plot2 <- ggplot(dat2plot, aes(y = modulation_evoked, fill = RDK_position2, x = 1)) +
  geom_flat_violin(aes(fill = RDK_position2),position = position_nudge(x = .1, y = 0), 
                   adjust = 1.3, trim = FALSE, alpha = 1, colour = NA)+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, show.legend = FALSE) +
  # scale_fill_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c("#193A3D", "#F03F3F"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("seagreen", "plum4"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("seagreen", "plum4"))+
  # scale_fill_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  # scale_color_manual(values=c(rgb2hex(0.0, 153.0, 204.0),rgb2hex(0.0, 77, 102.0)))+
  theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank())+
  theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank())+
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
  # scale_y_continuous(limits=c(-60, 140))
  scale_y_continuous(limits=yax_limits)



# cowplot::plot_grid(plot1, plot2, plot3, ncol = 3,labels = "AUTO")
plotttitle <- ggdraw() + 
  draw_label("SSVEP mod. | evoked \nacross cons | isoluminat", fontface='bold', size = 10)
plotplots <- ggarrange(plot1, plot2,ncol = 2,common.legend = TRUE,align = "h", widths=c(3,1))

savefig <- multi_panel_figure(columns = 1, rows = 1, panel_label_type = "none", width = 3.5, height = 5, unit = "in")
saveplot <- ggarrange(plotttitle, plotplots, nrow = 2, heights=c(0.2, 1))

savefig %<>%
  fill_panel(saveplot, column = 1, row = 1)
savefig

# save_multi_panel_figure(savefig, "figures/FFT_BeeSwarm_Mod_ALPHA_COL_34subs.eps")

Statistical analysis

Central Stimuli

analysis I

modulation ~ COLOR ATTENTION

  • t-test post-cue modulation against zero for attended and unattended color
  • t-test difference of post-cue modulation for attended vs unattended color


dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="center") %>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time == '[0.5 1.5] ', RDK_colorlum == 'isolum__to_bckgrd')


dat2plot %>%
  group_by(RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(modulation_evoked ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$modulation_evoked, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$modulation_evoked))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$modulation_evoked))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, RDK_isattended, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="holm")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
        caption = c("central SSVEP | modulation | t-tests for modulation agains zero | Holm-corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
central SSVEP | modulation | t-tests for modulation agains zero | Holm-corrected
RDK_colorlum RDK_isattended meanval std statistic parameter p.value BF10 BF01 CohensD
isolum__to_bckgrd attended 29.424 15.247 10.57 29 < .001 496550591.438 0.000 1.930
isolum__to_bckgrd not attended -8.373 11.186 -4.10 29 < .001 95.229 0.011 -0.749 
dat2plot %>%
  dplyr::select(-amplitude_evoked)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "RDK_isattended", values_from = "modulation_evoked")%>%
  mutate(attendedMINUSunattended = `attended` -`not attended`)%>%
  group_by(time, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(attendedMINUSunattended ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$attendedMINUSunattended, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$attendedMINUSunattended))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$attendedMINUSunattended))) %>%
  ungroup()%>%
  dplyr::select(-data, -time) %>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="holm")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("central SSVEP | modulation | attended - unattended ")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
central SSVEP | modulation | attended - unattended
RDK_colorlum meanval std statistic parameter p.value BF10 BF01 CohensD
isolum__to_bckgrd 37.796 18.33 11.294 29 < .001 2180989646 0 2.062


analysis II

modulation ~ COLOR ATTENTION x PERI STIM CONDITION

  • ANOVA
  • post hoc contrast via emmeans


dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="center", RDK_colorlum=="isolum__to_bckgrd") %>%
  mutate(condition_label = case_when(
    condition %in% c(1,2) ~ "peri_AttUnatt",
    condition %in% c(3,4) ~ "peri_AttIrrel",
    condition %in% c(5,6) ~ "peri_UnattIrrel"
  ))%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, condition_label)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time != '[1 2] ')

#average data by mean amplitude across all conditions
aovmodel1_data <- dat2plot %>%
  filter(time == '[-1 0] ')%>%
  group_by(subjects)%>%
  mutate(amplitude_evoked_norm = (amplitude_evoked/mean(amplitude_evoked)-1)*100)

aovmodel1_data %>%
  ungroup()%>%
  group_by(condition_label,RDK_isattended)%>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    M=mean(amplitude_evoked_norm),
    SD=sd(amplitude_evoked_norm)
  )%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5), caption = c("descriptives for central SSVEP pre-cue modulations (normalized by mean amplitudes)")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
descriptives for central SSVEP pre-cue modulations (normalized by mean amplitudes)
condition_label RDK_isattended n M SD
peri_AttIrrel attended 30 1.01534 4.64309
peri_AttIrrel not attended 30 -0.28527 8.29580
peri_AttUnatt attended 30 -0.13975 7.45519
peri_AttUnatt not attended 30 -1.39165 9.37073
peri_UnattIrrel attended 30 -1.17358 6.50498
peri_UnattIrrel not attended 30 1.97491 6.71667 
aovmodel1 <- aovmodel1_data%>%
  aov_ez(id="subjects", dv = "amplitude_evoked_norm", data = ., within = c("RDK_isattended","condition_label"),
         include_aov = afex_options("include_aov"))

# display table anova effects
aovmodel1 %>%
  anova()%>%
  tidy()%>%
  mutate(
    `p.value` = cell_spec(ifelse(round(`p.value`,4)<.001,"< .001",round(`p.value`,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),"blue", ifelse(`p.value` < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),F, ifelse(`p.value` < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, `num.Df`, `den.Df`, MSE, `statistic`, ges, `p.value`) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5), 
      caption = c("repeated measures ANOVA for central SSVEP pre-cue modulations (normalized by mean amplitudes)")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
repeated measures ANOVA for central SSVEP pre-cue modulations (normalized by mean amplitudes)
term num.Df den.Df MSE statistic ges p.value
RDK_isattended 1.00000 29.00000 63.74459 0.02786 0.00019 0.8686
condition_label 1.83856 53.31830 60.52224 0.47454 0.00564 0.6088
RDK_isattended:condition_label 1.56358 45.34369 93.49023 1.33946 0.02059 0.2678 
#post-cue descriptives
dat2plot %>%
  filter(time == '[0.5 1.5] ') %>%
  ungroup()%>%
  group_by(condition_label,RDK_isattended)%>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    M=mean(modulation_evoked),
    SD=sd(modulation_evoked)
  )%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5), caption = c("descriptives for central SSVEP post-cue modulations")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
descriptives for central SSVEP post-cue modulations
condition_label RDK_isattended n M SD
peri_AttIrrel attended 30 26.11182 21.13235
peri_AttIrrel not attended 30 -9.94337 13.24548
peri_AttUnatt attended 30 33.10831 20.84335
peri_AttUnatt not attended 30 -4.58864 19.74565
peri_UnattIrrel attended 30 29.05062 15.05679
peri_UnattIrrel not attended 30 -10.58588 13.65690 
# post cue anova
aovmodel2 <- dat2plot %>%
  filter(time == '[0.5 1.5] ')%>%
  aov_ez(id="subjects", dv = "modulation_evoked", data = ., within = c("RDK_isattended","condition_label"),include_aov = afex_options("include_aov"))

# display table anova effects
aovmodel2 %>%
  anova()%>%
  tidy()%>%
  mutate(
    `p.value` = cell_spec(ifelse(round(`p.value`,4)<.001,"< .001",round(`p.value`,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),"blue", ifelse(`p.value` < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),F, ifelse(`p.value` < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, `num.Df`, `den.Df`, MSE, `statistic`, ges, `p.value`) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5), caption = c("repeated measures ANOVA for central post-cue modulations")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
repeated measures ANOVA for central post-cue modulations
term num.Df den.Df MSE statistic ges p.value
RDK_isattended 1.00000 29.00000 504.0089 127.54722 0.54381 < .001
condition_label 1.66821 48.37816 212.1233 3.65854 0.02344 0.0406
RDK_isattended:condition_label 1.37318 39.82234 315.2829 0.22270 0.00178 0.7162 
#display main effects via emmeans
# Main effect of RDK_isattended
emm_ATT <- as.data.frame(emmeans(aovmodel2, ~ RDK_isattended))

# Main effect of condition_label
emm_Pericondition <- as.data.frame(emmeans(aovmodel2, ~ condition_label))

# RDK_isattended plot
ggplot(emm_ATT, aes(x = RDK_isattended, y = emmean, fill = RDK_isattended)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(), width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), width = 0.2) +
  labs(title = "Main Effect of RDK_isattended",
       y = "Estimated Marginal Means (95% CI)", x = "RDK_isattended") +
  theme_minimal()+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())

# condition_label plot
ggplot(emm_Pericondition, aes(x = condition_label, y = emmean, fill = condition_label)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(), width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), width = 0.2) +
  labs(title = "Main Effect of condition_label",
       y = "Estimated Marginal Means (95% CI)", x = "Condition Label") +
  theme_minimal()+
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())

#post hoc contrasts
post_hocs.RDK_isattended <- emmeans(aovmodel2, c("RDK_isattended"), contr = "pairwise",adjust = "FDR") # adjust = holm
post_hocs.condition_label <- emmeans(aovmodel2, c("condition_label"), contr = "pairwise",adjust = "FDR") # adjust = holm

# report data for post_hocs.RDK_isattended
post_hocs.RDK_isattended$emmeans %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("estimated marginal means | by ATTENTION | dv = central SSVEP modulation")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
estimated marginal means | by ATTENTION | dv = central SSVEP modulation
RDK_isattended emmean SE df lower.CL upper.CL
attended 29.424 2.784 29 23.730 35.117
not.attended -8.373 2.042 29 -12.549 -4.196 
summary(post_hocs.RDK_isattended$contrasts) %>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "left")
  ) %>%
  # mutate(CohensD = `t.ratio`/sqrt(df+1))%>%
  mutate(`CohensD` =
           summary(eff_size(contrast(post_hocs.RDK_isattended, method = "pairwise", adjust = "FDR"),
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(aovmodel2$lm)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(aovmodel2$lm), method = "identity"))$effect.size,
         `lowCI` =
           summary(eff_size(contrast(post_hocs.RDK_isattended, method = "pairwise", adjust = "FDR"),
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(aovmodel2$lm)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(aovmodel2$lm), method = "identity"))$lower.CL,
         `highCI` =
           summary(eff_size(contrast(post_hocs.RDK_isattended, method = "pairwise", adjust = "FDR"),
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(aovmodel2$lm)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(aovmodel2$lm), method = "identity"))$upper.CL
  )%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
        caption = c("contrasts for estimated marginal means |by ATTENTION | dv = central SSVEP modulation | corrected: FDR")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
contrasts for estimated marginal means |by ATTENTION | dv = central SSVEP modulation | corrected: FDR
contrast estimate SE df t.ratio p.value CohensD lowCI highCI
attended - not.attended 37.796 3.347 29 11.294 < .001 2.147 1.452 2.842 
# report data for post_hocs.condition_label
post_hocs.condition_label$emmeans %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("estimated marginal means | by PERI_CON | dv = central SSVEP modulation")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
estimated marginal means | by PERI_CON | dv = central SSVEP modulation
condition_label emmean SE df lower.CL upper.CL
peri_AttIrrel 8.084 2.452 29 3.070 13.098
peri_AttUnatt 14.260 2.372 29 9.408 19.111
peri_UnattIrrel 9.232 1.934 29 5.277 13.187 
summary(post_hocs.condition_label$contrasts) %>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "left")
  ) %>%
  # mutate(CohensD = `t.ratio`/sqrt(df+1))%>%
  mutate(`CohensD` =
           summary(eff_size(contrast(post_hocs.condition_label, method = "pairwise", adjust = "FDR"),
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(aovmodel2$lm)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(aovmodel2$lm), method = "identity"))$effect.size,
         `lowCI` =
           summary(eff_size(contrast(post_hocs.condition_label, method = "pairwise", adjust = "FDR"),
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(aovmodel2$lm)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(aovmodel2$lm), method = "identity"))$lower.CL,
         `highCI` =
           summary(eff_size(contrast(post_hocs.condition_label, method = "pairwise", adjust = "FDR"),
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(aovmodel2$lm)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(aovmodel2$lm), method = "identity"))$upper.CL
  )%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
        caption = c("contrasts for estimated marginal means |by PERI CON | dv = central SSVEP modulation | corrected: FDR")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
contrasts for estimated marginal means |by PERI CON | dv = central SSVEP modulation | corrected: FDR
contrast estimate SE df t.ratio p.value CohensD lowCI highCI
peri_AttIrrel - peri_AttUnatt -6.176 2.841 29 -2.174 0.057 -0.351 -0.694 -0.008
peri_AttIrrel - peri_UnattIrrel -1.148 2.469 29 -0.465 0.6454 -0.065 -0.353 0.222
peri_AttUnatt - peri_UnattIrrel 5.027 1.878 29 2.677 0.0363 0.286 0.054 0.517 
# pairs(emmeans(aovmodel2, ~ RDK_isattended))
# pairs(emmeans(aovmodel2, ~ condition_label))

analysis IIb

modulation ~ COLOR ATTENTION x PERI STIM CONDITION

  • linear mixed models
  • post hoc contrast via emmeans


dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="center", RDK_colorlum=="isolum__to_bckgrd") %>%
  mutate(condition_label = case_when(
    condition %in% c(1,2) ~ "peri_AttUnatt",
    condition %in% c(3,4) ~ "peri_AttIrrel",
    condition %in% c(5,6) ~ "peri_UnattIrrel"
  ))%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, condition_label)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time != '[1 2] ')

#average data by mean amplitude across all conditions
LMMmodel1_data <- dat2plot %>%
  filter(time == '[-1 0] ')%>%
  group_by(subjects)%>%
  mutate(amplitude_evoked_norm = (amplitude_evoked/mean(amplitude_evoked)-1)*100)

lmmmodel1 <- LMMmodel1_data%>%
  mixed(
    amplitude_evoked ~ RDK_isattended * condition_label + (1 | subjects),
    data = .,
    method = "KR",  # Kenward-Roger approximation for p-values
    return = "afex_aov"  # ensures compatibility with emmeans
  )



# display table anova effects
lmmmodel1 %>%
  anova()%>%
  tidy()%>%
  mutate(
    `p.value` = cell_spec(ifelse(round(`p.value`,4)<.001,"< .001",round(`p.value`,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),"blue", ifelse(`p.value` < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),F, ifelse(`p.value` < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, `num.Df`, `den.Df`, `statistic`, `p.value`) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5), 
      caption = c("Mixed Model Anova Table (Type 3 tests, KR-method) | central SSVEP pre-cue amplitudes (normalized by mean amplitudes)")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
Mixed Model Anova Table (Type 3 tests, KR-method) | central SSVEP pre-cue amplitudes (normalized by mean amplitudes)
term num.Df den.Df statistic p.value
RDK_isattended 1 145 0.03059 0.8614
condition_label 2 145 0.80961 0.447
RDK_isattended:condition_label 2 145 2.14943 0.1203 
# Display estimated marginal means of pre-cue amplitudes for the model
emmeans(lmmmodel1, ~  condition_label*RDK_isattended) %>%
  tidy() %>%
  dplyr::select(condition_label,RDK_isattended,estimate,std.error,df)%>%
  dplyr::arrange(condition_label)%>%
  dplyr::rename(emmean = estimate, SE = std.error)%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5), 
      caption = c("EMMEANs for LMM (Type 3 tests, KR-method) | central SSVEP pre-cue amplitudes")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
EMMEANs for LMM (Type 3 tests, KR-method) | central SSVEP pre-cue amplitudes
condition_label RDK_isattended emmean SE df
peri_AttIrrel attended 1.64712 0.17137 29.57685
peri_AttIrrel not attended 1.61721 0.17137 29.57685
peri_AttUnatt attended 1.62709 0.17137 29.57685
peri_AttUnatt not attended 1.60758 0.17137 29.57685
peri_UnattIrrel attended 1.61999 0.17137 29.57685
peri_UnattIrrel not attended 1.66144 0.17137 29.57685 
# post cue anova
lmmmodel2 <- dat2plot %>%
  filter(time == '[0.5 1.5] ')%>%
  mixed(
    modulation_evoked ~ RDK_isattended * condition_label + (1 | subjects),
    data = .,
    method = "KR",  # Kenward-Roger approximation for p-values
    return = "afex_aov"  # ensures compatibility with emmeans
  )

lmmmodel2 %>%
  anova()%>%
  tidy()%>%
  mutate(
    `p.value` = cell_spec(ifelse(round(`p.value`,4)<.001,"< .001",round(`p.value`,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),"blue", ifelse(`p.value` < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),F, ifelse(`p.value` < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, `num.Df`, `den.Df`, `statistic`, `p.value`) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5), 
      caption = c("Mixed Model Anova Table (Type 3 tests, KR-method) | central SSVEP post-cue modulations")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
Mixed Model Anova Table (Type 3 tests, KR-method) | central SSVEP post-cue modulations
term num.Df den.Df statistic p.value
RDK_isattended 1 145 249.00869 < .001
condition_label 2 145 2.50740 0.085
RDK_isattended:condition_label 2 145 0.18673 0.8299 
# Display estimated marginal means of pre-cue amplitudes for the model
emmeans(lmmmodel2, ~  condition_label*RDK_isattended) %>%
  tidy() %>%
  dplyr::select(condition_label,RDK_isattended,estimate,std.error,df)%>%
  dplyr::arrange(condition_label)%>%
  dplyr::rename(emmean = estimate, SE = std.error)%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5), 
      caption = c("EMMEANs for LMM (Type 3 tests, KR-method) | central SSVEP post-cue modulations")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
EMMEANs for LMM (Type 3 tests, KR-method) | central SSVEP post-cue modulations
condition_label RDK_isattended emmean SE df
peri_AttIrrel attended 26.11182 3.21418 152.7006
peri_AttIrrel not attended -9.94337 3.21418 152.7006
peri_AttUnatt attended 33.10831 3.21418 152.7006
peri_AttUnatt not attended -4.58864 3.21418 152.7006
peri_UnattIrrel attended 29.05062 3.21418 152.7006
peri_UnattIrrel not attended -10.58588 3.21418 152.7006 
#display main effects via emmeans
# Main effect of RDK_isattended
emm_ATT_lmm <- as.data.frame(emmeans(lmmmodel2, ~ RDK_isattended))

# Main effect of condition_label
emm_Pericondition_lmm <- as.data.frame(emmeans(lmmmodel2, ~ condition_label))

# RDK_isattended plot
ggplot(emm_ATT_lmm, aes(x = RDK_isattended, y = emmean, fill = RDK_isattended)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(), width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), width = 0.2) +
  labs(title = "Main Effect of RDK_isattended",
       y = "Estimated Marginal Means (95% CI)", x = "RDK_isattended") +
  theme_minimal()+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("steelblue2", "#F03F3F"))+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())

# condition_label plot
ggplot(emm_Pericondition_lmm, aes(x = condition_label, y = emmean, fill = condition_label)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(), width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), width = 0.2) +
  labs(title = "No Main Effect of condition_label",
       y = "Estimated Marginal Means (95% CI)", x = "Condition Label") +
  theme_minimal()+
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())

#post hoc contrasts identity
post_hocs.RDK_isattended_id <- emmeans(lmmmodel2, c("RDK_isattended"), contr = "identity",adjust = "FDR") # adjust = holm
post_hocs.condition_label_id <- emmeans(lmmmodel2, c("condition_label"), contr = "identity",adjust = "FDR") # adjust = holm

# report data for post_hoc attention
post_hocs.RDK_isattended_id%>%
  .$contrasts %>%
  tidy()%>%
  dplyr::rename(t.ratio=statistic, p.value=adj.p.value)%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "left")
  ) %>% # mutate(CohensD = `t.ratio`/sqrt(df+1))%>%
  mutate(`CohensD` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.RDK_isattended_id,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "identity"))$effect.size,
         `lowCI` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.RDK_isattended_id,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "identity"))$lower.CL,
         `highCI` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.RDK_isattended_id,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "identity"))$upper.CL
  )%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
      caption = c("estimated marginal means | by PERI_CON | dv = central SSVEP modulation | FDR corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
estimated marginal means | by PERI_CON | dv = central SSVEP modulation | FDR corrected
term contrast null.value estimate std.error df t.ratio p.value CohensD lowCI highCI
RDK_isattended attended 0 29.424 2.143 58.876 13.728 < .001 1.831 1.499 2.163
RDK_isattended not attended 0 -8.373 2.143 58.876 -3.906 < .001 -0.521 -0.794 -0.248 
# report data for post_hoc condition_label
post_hocs.condition_label_id%>%
  .$contrasts %>%
  tidy()%>%
  dplyr::rename(t.ratio=statistic, p.value=adj.p.value)%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "left")
  ) %>% # mutate(CohensD = `t.ratio`/sqrt(df+1))%>%
  mutate(`CohensD` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.condition_label_id,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "identity"))$effect.size,
         `lowCI` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.condition_label_id,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "identity"))$lower.CL,
         `highCI` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.condition_label_id,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "identity"))$upper.CL
  )%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
      caption = c("estimated marginal means | by PERI_CON | dv = central SSVEP modulation | FDR corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
estimated marginal means | by PERI_CON | dv = central SSVEP modulation | FDR corrected
term contrast null.value estimate std.error df t.ratio p.value CohensD lowCI highCI
condition_label peri_AttIrrel 0 8.084 2.455 90.617 3.293 0.0014 0.503 0.195 0.811
condition_label peri_AttUnatt 0 14.260 2.455 90.617 5.808 < .001 0.887 0.569 1.206
condition_label peri_UnattIrrel 0 9.232 2.455 90.617 3.760 < .001 0.575 0.265 0.884 
#post hoc contrasts paired
post_hocs.RDK_isattended <- emmeans(lmmmodel2, c("RDK_isattended"), contr = "pairwise",adjust = "FDR") # adjust = holm
post_hocs.condition_label <- emmeans(lmmmodel2, c("condition_label"), contr = "pairwise",adjust = "FDR") # adjust = holm


summary(post_hocs.RDK_isattended$contrasts) %>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "left")
  ) %>%
  # mutate(CohensD = `t.ratio`/sqrt(df+1))%>%
  mutate(`CohensD` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.RDK_isattended,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "pairwise"))$effect.size,
         `lowCI` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.RDK_isattended,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "pairwise"))$lower.CL,
         `highCI` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.RDK_isattended,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "pairwise"))$upper.CL
  )%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
        caption = c("contrasts for estimated marginal means |by ATTENTION | dv = central SSVEP modulation | corrected: FDR")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))

contrast estimate SE df t.ratio p.value CohensD lowCI highCI
attended - not attended 37.796 2.395 145 15.78 < .001 2.352 1.966 2.739 
summary(post_hocs.condition_label$contrasts) %>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "left")
  ) %>%
  # mutate(CohensD = `t.ratio`/sqrt(df+1))%>%
  mutate(`CohensD` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.condition_label,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "pairwise"))$effect.size,
         `lowCI` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.condition_label,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "pairwise"))$lower.CL,
         `highCI` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.condition_label,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "pairwise"))$upper.CL
  )%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
        caption = c("contrasts for estimated marginal means |by PERI CON | dv = central SSVEP modulation | corrected: FDR")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))

contrast estimate SE df t.ratio p.value CohensD lowCI highCI
peri_AttIrrel - peri_AttUnatt -6.176 2.934 145 -2.105 0.111 -0.384 -0.748 -0.021
peri_AttIrrel - peri_UnattIrrel -1.148 2.934 145 -0.391 0.6961 -0.071 -0.432 0.289
