# pairs(emmeans(aovmodel2, ~ RDK_isattended))
# pairs(emmeans(aovmodel2, ~ condition_label))

amp diff ~ COLOR ATTENTION

  • t-test post-cue modulation against zero for attended and unattended color
  • t-test difference of post-cue modulation for attended vs unattended color


dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="center") %>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  summarise(subtraction_evoked=mean(subtraction_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time == '[0.5 1.5] ')

dat2plot %>%
  group_by(RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(subtraction_evoked ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$subtraction_evoked, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$subtraction_evoked))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$subtraction_evoked))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, RDK_isattended, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="holm")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
        caption = c("central SSVEP | amp diff | t-tests for modulation agains zero | Holm-corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
central SSVEP | amp diff | t-tests for modulation agains zero | Holm-corrected
RDK_colorlum RDK_isattended meanval std statistic parameter p.value BF10 BF01 CohensD
offset_to_bckgrd attended 0.085 0.172 2.218 19 0.039 1.691 0.591 0.496
offset_to_bckgrd not attended 0.047 0.222 0.956 19 0.3512 0.348 2.873 0.214
isolum__to_bckgrd attended 0.407 0.324 6.886 29 < .001 106414.005 0.000 1.257
isolum__to_bckgrd not attended -0.176 0.181 -5.313 29 < .001 1998.489 0.001 -0.970 
dat2plot %>%
  dplyr::select(-modulation_evoked)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "RDK_isattended", values_from = "subtraction_evoked")%>%
  mutate(attendedMINUSunattended = `attended` -`not attended`)%>%
  group_by(time, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(attendedMINUSunattended ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$attendedMINUSunattended, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$attendedMINUSunattended))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$attendedMINUSunattended))) %>%
  ungroup()%>%
  dplyr::select(-data, -time) %>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="holm")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("central SSVEP | amp diff | attended - unattended ")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
central SSVEP | amp diff | attended - unattended
RDK_colorlum meanval std statistic parameter p.value BF10 BF01 CohensD
offset_to_bckgrd 0.038 0.203 0.834 19 0.4144 0.317 3.158 0.187
isolum__to_bckgrd 0.583 0.368 8.664 29 < .001 7560272.382 0.000 1.582

Peripheral Stimuli

analysis I

modulation ~ COLOR ATTENTION

ANOVA_RM: modulation ~ ATTENTION (centrally cued, centrally uncued, irrelevant)

  • post-hoc t-test contrasting differences between all levels
  • post-hoc t-test difference of post-cue modulation for attended vs unattended color


dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="peri") %>%
  filter(RDK_ispresented=="presented")%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time == '[0.5 1.5] ')

dat2plot %>%
  group_by(time, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats= purrr::map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    anova(aov_ez(id="subjects", dv = "modulation_evoked", data = ., within = "RDK_isattended"))
  ))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest()%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(
    `p.value` = cell_spec(ifelse(round(`p.value`,4)<.001,"< .001",round(`p.value`,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),"blue", ifelse(`p.value` < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),F, ifelse(`p.value` < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, term, `num.Df`, `den.Df`, MSE, `statistic`, ges, `p.value`) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("repeated measures ANOVA for peripheral SSVEP amplitudes")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
repeated measures ANOVA for peripheral SSVEP amplitudes
RDK_colorlum term num.Df den.Df MSE statistic ges p.value
offset_to_bckgrd RDK_isattended 1.589 30.196 487.019 1.387 0.054 0.2618
isolum__to_bckgrd RDK_isattended 1.848 53.606 177.867 10.071 0.144 < .001 
dat2plot %>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum, RDK_isattended)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(modulation_evoked ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$modulation_evoked, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$modulation_evoked))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$modulation_evoked))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, RDK_isattended, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum)%>%
  mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="fdr")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
        caption = c("peripheral SSVEP | modulation | t-tests for modulation agains zero | FDR-corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
peripheral SSVEP | modulation | t-tests for modulation agains zero | FDR-corrected
RDK_colorlum RDK_isattended meanval std statistic parameter p.value BF10 BF01 CohensD
offset_to_bckgrd attended 5.441 9.361 2.599 19 0.0426 3.209 0.312 0.581
offset_to_bckgrd irrelevant 1.946 19.699 0.442 19 0.6636 0.254 3.942 0.099
offset_to_bckgrd not attended 12.142 22.886 2.373 19 0.0426 2.178 0.459 0.531
isolum__to_bckgrd attended 4.729 15.899 1.629 29 0.1141 0.633 1.580 0.297
isolum__to_bckgrd irrelevant -6.850 14.580 -2.573 29 0.0232 3.124 0.320 -0.470
isolum__to_bckgrd not attended -9.123 14.588 -3.425 29 0.0056 19.255 0.052 -0.625 
dat2plot %>%
  dplyr::select(-amplitude_evoked)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "RDK_isattended", values_from = "modulation_evoked")%>%
  mutate(attendedMINUSunattended = `attended` -`not attended`, 
         attendedMINUSirrelevant = `attended` -`irrelevant`,
         irrelevantMINUSunattended = `irrelevant` -`not attended`)%>%
  dplyr::select(-attended, -`not attended`, -irrelevant, -time)%>%
  pivot_longer(cols=`attendedMINUSunattended`:`irrelevantMINUSunattended`, names_to = "contrast", values_to = "amplitude")%>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum, contrast)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(amplitude ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$amplitude, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$amplitude))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$amplitude))) %>%
  ungroup()%>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum)%>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, contrast, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="fdr")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("peripheral SSVEP | modulation | contrasts | fdr corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
peripheral SSVEP | modulation | contrasts | fdr corrected
RDK_colorlum contrast meanval std statistic parameter p.value BF10 BF01 CohensD
offset_to_bckgrd attendedMINUSunattended -6.701 24.648 -1.216 19 0.3584 0.443 2.258 -0.272
offset_to_bckgrd attendedMINUSirrelevant 3.494 23.419 0.667 19 0.5126 0.284 3.527 0.149
offset_to_bckgrd irrelevantMINUSunattended -10.195 34.147 -1.335 19 0.3584 0.503 1.988 -0.299
isolum__to_bckgrd attendedMINUSunattended 13.852 15.367 4.937 29 < .001 768.964 0.001 0.901
isolum__to_bckgrd attendedMINUSirrelevant 11.579 19.738 3.213 29 0.0048 11.939 0.084 0.587
isolum__to_bckgrd irrelevantMINUSunattended 2.272 18.990 0.655 29 0.5173 0.237 4.220 0.120

am diff ~ COLOR ATTENTION

ANOVA_RM: modulation ~ ATTENTION (centrally cued, centrally uncued, irrelevant)

  • post-hoc t-test contrasting differences between all levels
  • post-hoc t-test difference of post-cue modulation for attended vs unattended color


dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="peri") %>%
  filter(RDK_ispresented=="presented")%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  summarise(subtraction_evoked=mean(subtraction_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time == '[0.5 1.5] ')

dat2plot %>%
  group_by(time, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats= purrr::map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    anova(aov_ez(id="subjects", dv = "subtraction_evoked", data = ., within = "RDK_isattended"))
  ))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest()%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(
    `p.value` = cell_spec(ifelse(round(`p.value`,4)<.001,"< .001",round(`p.value`,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),"blue", ifelse(`p.value` < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),F, ifelse(`p.value` < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, term, `num.Df`, `den.Df`, MSE, `statistic`, ges, `p.value`) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("repeated measures ANOVA for peripheral SSVEP amp diffs")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
repeated measures ANOVA for peripheral SSVEP amp diffs
RDK_colorlum term num.Df den.Df MSE statistic ges p.value
offset_to_bckgrd RDK_isattended 1.566 29.757 0.048 1.142 0.044 0.3209
isolum__to_bckgrd RDK_isattended 1.984 57.549 0.063 13.772 0.224 < .001 
dat2plot %>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum, RDK_isattended)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(subtraction_evoked ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$subtraction_evoked, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$subtraction_evoked))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$subtraction_evoked))) %>%
  ungroup()%>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum)%>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, RDK_isattended, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="fdr")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
        caption = c("peripheral SSVEP | amp diff | t-tests for modulation against zero | Holm-corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))

dat2plot %>%
  dplyr::select(-modulation_evoked)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "RDK_isattended", values_from = "subtraction_evoked")%>%
  mutate(attendedMINUSunattended = `attended` -`not attended`, 
         attendedMINUSirrelevant = `attended` -`irrelevant`,
         irrelevantMINUSunattended = `irrelevant` -`not attended`)%>%
  dplyr::select(-attended, -`not attended`, -irrelevant, -time)%>%
  pivot_longer(cols=`attendedMINUSunattended`:`irrelevantMINUSunattended`, names_to = "contrast", values_to = "amplitude")%>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum, contrast)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(amplitude ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$amplitude, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$amplitude))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$amplitude))) %>%
  ungroup()%>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum)%>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, contrast, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="fdr")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("peripheral SSVEP | amp diff | contrasts | fdr corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))

analysis II

modulation ~ condition

ANOVA_RM: modulation ~ CONDITION ( attended + irrelevant attended + not attended irrelevant + attended irrelevant + not attended not attended + attended not attended + irrelevant )

  • post-hoc t-test contrasting differences between defined levels
  • post-hoc t-test difference of post-cue modulation for attended vs unattended color


dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="peri") %>%
  filter(RDK_ispresented=="presented")%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended2, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time == '[0.5 1.5] ')

dat2plot %>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum, time)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats= purrr::map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    anova(aov_ez(id="subjects", dv = "modulation_evoked", data = ., within = "RDK_isattended2"))
  ))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest()%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(
    `p.value` = cell_spec(ifelse(round(`p.value`,4)<.001,"< .001",round(`p.value`,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),"blue", ifelse(`p.value` < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),F, ifelse(`p.value` < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, term, `num.Df`, `den.Df`, MSE, `statistic`, ges, `p.value`) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("repeated measures ANOVA for peripheral SSVEP amplitudes")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
repeated measures ANOVA for peripheral SSVEP amplitudes
RDK_colorlum term num.Df den.Df MSE statistic ges p.value
offset_to_bckgrd RDK_isattended2 2.989 56.792 1152.305 2.046 0.087 0.1179
isolum__to_bckgrd RDK_isattended2 4.127 119.692 394.490 4.673 0.101 0.0014 
dat2plot %>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum, RDK_isattended2)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(modulation_evoked ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$modulation_evoked, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$modulation_evoked))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$modulation_evoked))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  ungroup()%>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum)%>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, RDK_isattended2, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="fdr")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
        caption = c("peripheral SSVEP | modulation | t-tests for modulation agains zero | fdr-corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
peripheral SSVEP | modulation | t-tests for modulation agains zero | fdr-corrected
RDK_colorlum RDK_isattended2 meanval std statistic parameter p.value BF10 BF01 CohensD
offset_to_bckgrd attended + irrelevant 8.465 17.873 2.118 19 0.1427 1.445 0.692 0.474
offset_to_bckgrd attended + not attended 2.416 13.913 0.777 19 0.8257 0.304 3.289 0.174
offset_to_bckgrd irrelevant + attended -0.201 21.786 -0.041 19 0.9676 0.233 4.301 -0.009
offset_to_bckgrd irrelevant + not attended 4.094 32.573 0.562 19 0.8257 0.268 3.735 0.126
offset_to_bckgrd not attended + attended 1.714 18.804 0.408 19 0.8257 0.250 3.994 0.091
offset_to_bckgrd not attended + irrelevant 22.570 38.639 2.612 19 0.1028 3.283 0.305 0.584
isolum__to_bckgrd attended + irrelevant 1.187 22.490 0.289 29 0.7745 0.202 4.949 0.053
isolum__to_bckgrd attended + not attended 8.271 19.512 2.322 29 0.055 1.940 0.516 0.424
isolum__to_bckgrd irrelevant + attended -8.755 15.378 -3.118 29 0.0192 9.688 0.103 -0.569
isolum__to_bckgrd irrelevant + not attended -4.946 19.877 -1.363 29 0.2201 0.449 2.229 -0.249
isolum__to_bckgrd not attended + attended -8.617 22.063 -2.139 29 0.0614 1.403 0.713 -0.391
isolum__to_bckgrd not attended + irrelevant -9.628 17.945 -2.939 29 0.0192 6.581 0.152 -0.537 
dat2plot %>%
  dplyr::select(-amplitude_evoked)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "RDK_isattended2", values_from = "modulation_evoked")%>%
  mutate(`attended-notattMINUSirre` = `attended + not attended` -`attended + irrelevant`, 
         `notattended-attMINUSirre` = `not attended + attended` -`not attended + irrelevant`,
         `irrelevant-atteMINUSnotatt` = `irrelevant + attended` -`irrelevant + not attended`)%>%
  dplyr::select(-c(`attended + irrelevant`:`not attended + irrelevant`))%>%
  pivot_longer(cols=`attended-notattMINUSirre`:`irrelevant-atteMINUSnotatt`, names_to = "contrast", values_to = "amplitude")%>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum, contrast)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(amplitude ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$amplitude, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$amplitude))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$amplitude))) %>%
  ungroup()%>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  ungroup()%>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum)%>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, contrast, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="fdr")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("peripheral SSVEP | modulation | contrasts fdr-corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
peripheral SSVEP | modulation | contrasts fdr-corrected
RDK_colorlum contrast meanval std statistic parameter p.value BF10 BF01 CohensD
offset_to_bckgrd attended-notattMINUSirre -6.049 25.991 -1.041 19 0.4666 0.374 2.671 -0.233
offset_to_bckgrd notattended-attMINUSirre -20.856 39.975 -2.333 19 0.0923 2.041 0.490 -0.522
offset_to_bckgrd irrelevant-atteMINUSnotatt -4.294 38.976 -0.493 19 0.6279 0.259 3.859 -0.110
isolum__to_bckgrd attended-notattMINUSirre 7.084 27.604 1.406 29 0.4694 0.472 2.117 0.257
isolum__to_bckgrd notattended-attMINUSirre 1.011 27.684 0.200 29 0.8429 0.198 5.050 0.037
isolum__to_bckgrd irrelevant-atteMINUSnotatt -3.810 20.319 -1.027 29 0.4694 0.314 3.180 -0.187

amp diff ~ condition

ANOVA_RM: modulation ~ CONDITION ( attended + irrelevant attended + not attended irrelevant + attended irrelevant + not attended not attended + attended not attended + irrelevant )

  • post-hoc t-test contrasting differences between defined levels
  • post-hoc t-test difference of post-cue modulation for attended vs unattended color


dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="peri") %>%
  filter(RDK_ispresented=="presented")%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended2, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  summarise(subtraction_evoked=mean(subtraction_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time == '[0.5 1.5] ')

dat2plot %>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum, time)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats= purrr::map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    anova(aov_ez(id="subjects", dv = "subtraction_evoked", data = ., within = "RDK_isattended2"))
  ))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest()%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(
    `p.value` = cell_spec(ifelse(round(`p.value`,4)<.001,"< .001",round(`p.value`,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),"blue", ifelse(`p.value` < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),F, ifelse(`p.value` < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, term, `num.Df`, `den.Df`, MSE, `statistic`, ges, `p.value`) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("repeated measures ANOVA for peripheral SSVEP amp diffs")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
repeated measures ANOVA for peripheral SSVEP amp diffs
RDK_colorlum term num.Df den.Df MSE statistic ges p.value
offset_to_bckgrd RDK_isattended2 3.253 61.811 0.104 2.171 0.092 0.0955
isolum__to_bckgrd RDK_isattended2 3.930 113.960 0.111 8.486 0.176 < .001 
dat2plot %>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum, RDK_isattended2)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(subtraction_evoked ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$subtraction_evoked, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$subtraction_evoked))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$subtraction_evoked))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  ungroup()%>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum)%>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, RDK_isattended2, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="fdr")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
        caption = c("peripheral SSVEP | amp diff | t-tests for modulation against zero | fdr-corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
peripheral SSVEP | amp diff | t-tests for modulation against zero | fdr-corrected
RDK_colorlum RDK_isattended2 meanval std statistic parameter p.value BF10 BF01 CohensD

offset_to_bckgrd attended + not attended -0.004 0.165 -0.100 19 0.9213 0.233 4.285 -0.022
offset_to_bckgrd irrelevant + attended -0.032 0.234 -0.614 19 0.9213 0.275 3.635 -0.137
offset_to_bckgrd irrelevant + not attended 0.010 0.333 0.133 19 0.9213 0.234 4.270 0.030
offset_to_bckgrd not attended + attended -0.021 0.191 -0.503 19 0.9213 0.260 3.842 -0.112
offset_to_bckgrd not attended + irrelevant 0.176 0.286 2.756 19 0.0754 4.237 0.236 0.616
isolum__to_bckgrd attended + irrelevant 0.025 0.295 0.457 29 0.6512 0.214 4.671 0.083
isolum__to_bckgrd attended + not attended 0.150 0.333 2.473 29 0.0292 2.573 0.389 0.452

isolum__to_bckgrd irrelevant + not attended -0.111 0.339 -1.790 29 0.1007 0.798 1.253 -0.327

dat2plot %>%
  dplyr::select(-modulation_evoked)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "RDK_isattended2", values_from = "subtraction_evoked")%>%
  mutate(`attended-notattMINUSirre` = `attended + not attended` -`attended + irrelevant`, 
         `notattended-attMINUSirre` = `not attended + attended` -`not attended + irrelevant`,
         `irrelevant-atteMINUSnotatt` = `irrelevant + attended` -`irrelevant + not attended`)%>%
  dplyr::select(-c(`attended + irrelevant`:`not attended + irrelevant`))%>%
  pivot_longer(cols=`attended-notattMINUSirre`:`irrelevant-atteMINUSnotatt`, names_to = "contrast", values_to = "amplitude")%>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum, contrast)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(amplitude ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$amplitude, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$amplitude))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$amplitude))) %>%
  ungroup()%>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum)%>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, contrast, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="fdr")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("peripheral SSVEP | amp diff | contrasts | FDR-corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))

analysis II [displayed differently]

modulation ~ condition

ANOVA_RM: modulation ~ CONDITION ( attended + irrelevant attended + not attended irrelevant + attended irrelevant + not attended not attended + attended not attended + irrelevant )

  • post-hoc t-test contrasting differences between defined levels
  • post-hoc t-test difference of post-cue modulation for attended vs unattended color


dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="peri") %>%
  filter(RDK_ispresented=="presented")%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended2, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time == '[0.5 1.5] ')


dat2plot2 <- DataIn %>%
  mutate(condition2 = case_when(
    (condition == 1 | condition == 2) ~ "peri_att_unatt",
    (condition == 3 | condition == 4) ~ "peri_att_irrel",
    (condition == 5 | condition == 6) ~ "peri_unatt_irrel",
  )) %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="peri") %>%
  filter(RDK_ispresented=="presented")%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum, condition2)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time=='[0.5 1.5] ')

dat2plot %>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum, time)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats= purrr::map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    anova(aov_ez(id="subjects", dv = "modulation_evoked", data = ., within = "RDK_isattended2"))
  ))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest()%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(
    `p.value` = cell_spec(ifelse(round(`p.value`,4)<.001,"< .001",round(`p.value`,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),"blue", ifelse(`p.value` < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),F, ifelse(`p.value` < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, term, `num.Df`, `den.Df`, MSE, `statistic`, ges, `p.value`) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("repeated measures ANOVA for peripheral SSVEP amplitudes")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
repeated measures ANOVA for peripheral SSVEP amplitudes
RDK_colorlum term num.Df den.Df MSE statistic ges p.value
offset_to_bckgrd RDK_isattended2 2.989 56.792 1152.305 2.046 0.087 0.1179
isolum__to_bckgrd RDK_isattended2 4.127 119.692 394.490 4.673 0.101 0.0014 
dat2plot2 %>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum, condition2, RDK_isattended)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(modulation_evoked ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$modulation_evoked, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$modulation_evoked))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$modulation_evoked))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum,condition2, RDK_isattended, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="fdr")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  arrange(RDK_colorlum,condition2,RDK_isattended)%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
        caption = c("peripheral SSVEP | modulation | t-tests for modulation agains zero | FDR-corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
peripheral SSVEP | modulation | t-tests for modulation agains zero | FDR-corrected
RDK_colorlum condition2 RDK_isattended meanval std statistic parameter p.value BF10 BF01 CohensD

isolum__to_bckgrd peri_att_irrel irrelevant -8.755 15.378 -3.118 29 0.0192 9.688 0.103 -0.569
isolum__to_bckgrd peri_att_unatt attended 8.271 19.512 2.322 29 0.055 1.940 0.516 0.424
isolum__to_bckgrd peri_att_unatt not attended -8.617 22.063 -2.139 29 0.0614 1.403 0.713 -0.391
isolum__to_bckgrd peri_unatt_irrel irrelevant -4.946 19.877 -1.363 29 0.2201 0.449 2.229 -0.249
isolum__to_bckgrd peri_unatt_irrel not attended -9.628 17.945 -2.939 29 0.0192 6.581 0.152 -0.537
offset_to_bckgrd peri_att_irrel attended 8.465 17.873 2.118 19 0.1427 1.445 0.692 0.474
offset_to_bckgrd peri_att_irrel irrelevant -0.201 21.786 -0.041 19 0.9676 0.233 4.301 -0.009
offset_to_bckgrd peri_att_unatt attended 2.416 13.913 0.777 19 0.8257 0.304 3.289 0.174
offset_to_bckgrd peri_att_unatt not attended 1.714 18.804 0.408 19 0.8257 0.250 3.994 0.091

dat2plot2 %>%
  dplyr::select(-amplitude_evoked)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "RDK_isattended", values_from = "modulation_evoked")%>%
  mutate(`attended-notattended` = `attended` -`not attended`, 
         `attended-irrelevant` = `attended` -`irrelevant`,
         `notattended-irrelevant` = `not attended` -`irrelevant`)%>%
  dplyr::select(-c(`attended`:`not attended`))%>%
  pivot_longer(cols=`attended-notattended`:`notattended-irrelevant`, names_to = "contrast", values_to = "amplitude")%>%
  drop_na(amplitude)%>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum, condition2)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(amplitude ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$amplitude, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$amplitude))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$amplitude))) %>%
  ungroup()%>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum)%>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, condition2, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="fdr")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("peripheral SSVEP | modulation | contrasts FDR-corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
peripheral SSVEP | modulation | contrasts FDR-corrected
RDK_colorlum condition2 meanval std statistic parameter p.value BF10 BF01 CohensD
offset_to_bckgrd peri_att_irrel 8.666 31.261 1.240 19 0.3453 0.454 2.203 0.277
offset_to_bckgrd peri_att_unatt 0.702 22.730 0.138 19 0.8916 0.234 4.267 0.031
offset_to_bckgrd peri_unatt_irrel 18.476 58.475 1.413 19 0.3453 0.549 1.821 0.316
isolum__to_bckgrd peri_att_irrel 9.942 25.715 2.118 29 0.0643 1.352 0.740 0.387
isolum__to_bckgrd peri_att_unatt 16.888 24.355 3.798 29 0.0021 45.992 0.022 0.693
isolum__to_bckgrd peri_unatt_irrel -4.683 27.811 -0.922 29 0.364 0.287 3.486 -0.168

analysis IIb

modulation ~ COLOR ATTENTION x PERI STIM CONDITION

  • linear mixed models
  • post hoc contrast via emmeans


dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2!="center", RDK_colorlum=="isolum__to_bckgrd") %>%
  mutate(condition_label = case_when(
    condition %in% c(1,2) ~ "peri_AttUnatt",
    condition %in% c(3,4) ~ "peri_AttIrrel",
    condition %in% c(5,6) ~ "peri_UnattIrrel"
  ))%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, condition_label)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time != '[1 2] ')

# pre-cue
#average data by mean amplitude across all conditions
LMMmodel1_data <- dat2plot %>%
  filter(time == '[-1 0] ')%>%
  group_by(subjects)%>%
  mutate(amplitude_evoked_norm = (amplitude_evoked/mean(amplitude_evoked)-1)*100)

lmmmodel1 <- LMMmodel1_data%>%
  mixed(
    amplitude_evoked ~ RDK_isattended * condition_label + (1 | subjects),
    data = .,
    method = "KR",  # Kenward-Roger approximation for p-values
    return = "afex_aov"  # ensures compatibility with emmeans
  )

# Display estimated marginal means of pre-cue amplitudes for the model
emmeans(lmmmodel1, ~  condition_label*RDK_isattended) %>%
  tidy() %>%
  dplyr::select(condition_label,RDK_isattended,estimate,std.error,df)%>%
  dplyr::arrange(condition_label)%>%
  dplyr::rename(emmean = estimate, SE = std.error)%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5), 
      caption = c("EMMEANs for LMM (Type 3 tests, KR-method) | peripheral SSVEP pre-cue amplitudes")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
EMMEANs for LMM (Type 3 tests, KR-method) | peripheral SSVEP pre-cue amplitudes
condition_label RDK_isattended emmean SE df
peri_AttIrrel attended 1.78029 0.13878 123.2464
peri_AttIrrel irrelevant 1.71731 0.13878 123.2464
peri_AttIrrel not attended 0.60937 0.13878 123.2464
peri_AttUnatt attended 1.74782 0.13878 123.2464
peri_AttUnatt irrelevant 0.63358 0.13878 123.2464
peri_AttUnatt not attended 1.81048 0.13878 123.2464
peri_UnattIrrel attended 0.58358 0.13878 123.2464
peri_UnattIrrel irrelevant 1.72586 0.13878 123.2464
peri_UnattIrrel not attended 1.84278 0.13878 123.2464 
# display table anova effects
lmmmodel1 %>%
  anova()%>%
  tidy()%>%
  mutate(
    `p.value` = cell_spec(ifelse(round(`p.value`,4)<.001,"< .001",round(`p.value`,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),"blue", ifelse(`p.value` < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),F, ifelse(`p.value` < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, `num.Df`, `den.Df`, `statistic`, `p.value`) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5), 
      caption = c("Mixed Model Anova Table (Type 3 tests, KR-method) | peripheral SSVEP pre-cue modulations (normalized by mean amplitudes)")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
Mixed Model Anova Table (Type 3 tests, KR-method) | peripheral SSVEP pre-cue modulations (normalized by mean amplitudes)
term num.Df den.Df statistic p.value
RDK_isattended 2 232 0.26971 0.7638
condition_label 2 232 0.04989 0.9513
RDK_isattended:condition_label 4 232 56.08695 < .001 
# post cue LMM
lmmmodel2 <- dat2plot %>%
  filter(time == '[0.5 1.5] ')%>%
  mixed(
    modulation_evoked ~ RDK_isattended * condition_label + (1 | subjects),
    data = .,
    method = "KR",  # Kenward-Roger approximation for p-values
    return = "afex_aov"  # ensures compatibility with emmeans
  )

# summary(lmmmodel2$full_model)

# Display estimated marginal means of pre-cue amplitudes for the model
emmeans(lmmmodel2, ~  condition_label*RDK_isattended) %>%
  tidy() %>%
  dplyr::select(condition_label,RDK_isattended,estimate,std.error,df)%>%
  dplyr::arrange(condition_label)%>%
  dplyr::rename(emmean = estimate, SE = std.error)%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5), 
      caption = c("EMMEANs for LMM (Type 3 tests, KR-method) | peripheral SSVEP post-cue modulations")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
EMMEANs for LMM (Type 3 tests, KR-method) | peripheral SSVEP post-cue modulations
condition_label RDK_isattended emmean SE df
peri_AttIrrel attended 1.18724 4.29211 255.7979
peri_AttIrrel irrelevant -8.75515 4.29211 255.7979
peri_AttIrrel not attended 0.70025 4.29211 255.7979
peri_AttUnatt attended 8.27095 4.29211 255.7979
peri_AttUnatt irrelevant -2.88609 4.29211 255.7979
peri_AttUnatt not attended -8.61735 4.29211 255.7979
peri_UnattIrrel attended 6.30661 4.29211 255.7979
peri_UnattIrrel irrelevant -4.94563 4.29211 255.7979
peri_UnattIrrel not attended -9.62829 4.29211 255.7979 
lmmmodel2 %>%
  anova()%>%
  tidy()%>%
  mutate(
    `p.value` = cell_spec(ifelse(round(`p.value`,4)<.001,"< .001",round(`p.value`,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),"blue", ifelse(`p.value` < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),F, ifelse(`p.value` < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, `num.Df`, `den.Df`, `statistic`, `p.value`) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5,5), 
      caption = c("Mixed Model Anova Table (Type 3 tests, KR-method) | peripheral SSVEP post-cue modulations")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
Mixed Model Anova Table (Type 3 tests, KR-method) | peripheral SSVEP post-cue modulations
term num.Df den.Df statistic p.value
RDK_isattended 2 232 6.85060 0.0013
condition_label 2 232 0.12869 0.8793
RDK_isattended:condition_label 4 232 1.49798 0.2036 
#display main effects via emmeans
# Main effect of RDK_isattended
emm_ATT_lmm <- as.data.frame(emmeans(lmmmodel2, ~ RDK_isattended))

# Main effect of condition_label
emm_Pericondition_lmm <- as.data.frame(emmeans(lmmmodel2, ~ condition_label))

# RDK_isattended plot
ggplot(emm_ATT_lmm, aes(x = RDK_isattended, y = emmean, fill = RDK_isattended)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(), width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), width = 0.2) +
  labs(title = "Main Effect of RDK_isattended",
       y = "Estimated Marginal Means (95% CI)", x = "RDK_isattended") +
  theme_minimal()+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#F1831A", "#293C4A", "#198A83"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#F1831A", "#293C4A", "#198A83"))+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())

# condition_label plot
ggplot(emm_Pericondition_lmm, aes(x = condition_label, y = emmean, fill = condition_label)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(), width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), width = 0.2) +
  labs(title = "No Main Effect of condition_label",
       y = "Estimated Marginal Means (95% CI)", x = "Condition Label") +
  theme_minimal()+
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2")+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())

# firs test identity contrasts
#post hoc contrasts
post_hocs.RDK_isattended_id <- emmeans(lmmmodel2, c("RDK_isattended"), contr = "identity",adjust = "FDR") # adjust = FDr
post_hocs.condition_label_id <- emmeans(lmmmodel2, c("condition_label"), contr = "identity",adjust = "FDR") # adjust = FDR

# report data for post_hoc attention
post_hocs.RDK_isattended_id%>%
  .$contrasts %>%
  tidy()%>%
  dplyr::rename(t.ratio=statistic, p.value=adj.p.value)%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "left")
  ) %>% # mutate(CohensD = `t.ratio`/sqrt(df+1))%>%
  mutate(`CohensD` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.RDK_isattended_id,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "identity"))$effect.size,
         `lowCI` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.RDK_isattended_id,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "identity"))$lower.CL,
         `highCI` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.RDK_isattended_id,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "identity"))$upper.CL
  )%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
      caption = c("estimated marginal means | by ATTENTION | dv = peripheral SSVEP modulation | FDR corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
estimated marginal means | by ATTENTION | dv = peripheral SSVEP modulation | FDR corrected
term contrast null.value estimate std.error df t.ratio p.value CohensD lowCI highCI
RDK_isattended attended 0 5.255 2.6 130.685 2.021 0.0453 0.229 0.004 0.455
RDK_isattended irrelevant 0 -5.529 2.6 130.685 -2.127 0.0453 -0.241 -0.467 -0.016
RDK_isattended not attended 0 -5.848 2.6 130.685 -2.249 0.0453 -0.255 -0.481 -0.030 
# report data for post_hoc condition_label
post_hocs.condition_label_id%>%
  .$contrasts %>%
  tidy()%>%
  dplyr::rename(t.ratio=statistic, p.value=adj.p.value)%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "left")
  ) %>% # mutate(CohensD = `t.ratio`/sqrt(df+1))%>%
  mutate(`CohensD` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.condition_label_id,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "identity"))$effect.size,
         `lowCI` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.condition_label_id,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "identity"))$lower.CL,
         `highCI` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.condition_label_id,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "identity"))$upper.CL
  )%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
      caption = c("estimated marginal means | by PERI_CON | dv = peripheral SSVEP modulation | FDR corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
estimated marginal means | by PERI_CON | dv = peripheral SSVEP modulation | FDR corrected
term contrast null.value estimate std.error df t.ratio p.value CohensD lowCI highCI
condition_label peri_AttIrrel 0 -2.289 2.6 130.685 -0.880 0.5703 -0.100 -0.325 0.125
condition_label peri_AttUnatt 0 -1.077 2.6 130.685 -0.414 0.6792 -0.047 -0.272 0.178
condition_label peri_UnattIrrel 0 -2.756 2.6 130.685 -1.060 0.5703 -0.120 -0.345 0.104 
#post hoc contrasts
post_hocs.RDK_isattended <- emmeans(lmmmodel2, c("RDK_isattended"), contr = "pairwise",adjust = "FDR") # adjust = holm
post_hocs.condition_label <- emmeans(lmmmodel2, c("condition_label"), contr = "pairwise",adjust = "FDR") # adjust = holm

summary(post_hocs.RDK_isattended$contrasts) %>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "left")
  ) %>%
  # mutate(CohensD = `t.ratio`/sqrt(df+1))%>%
  mutate(`CohensD` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.RDK_isattended,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "pairwise"))$effect.size,
         `lowCI` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.RDK_isattended,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "pairwise"))$lower.CL,
         `highCI` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.RDK_isattended,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "pairwise"))$upper.CL
  )%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
        caption = c("contrasts for estimated marginal means | by ATTENTION | dv = peripheral SSVEP modulation | corrected: FDR")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
contrasts for estimated marginal means | by ATTENTION | dv = peripheral SSVEP modulation | corrected: FDR
contrast estimate SE df t.ratio p.value CohensD lowCI highCI

attended - not attended 11.103 3.415 232 3.251 0.0027 0.485 0.188 0.781
irrelevant - not attended 0.320 3.415 232 0.094 0.9255 0.014 -0.280 0.308 
summary(post_hocs.condition_label$contrasts) %>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "left")
  ) %>%
  # mutate(CohensD = `t.ratio`/sqrt(df+1))%>%
  mutate(`CohensD` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.condition_label,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "pairwise"))$effect.size,
         `lowCI` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.condition_label,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "pairwise"))$lower.CL,
         `highCI` =
           summary(eff_size(post_hocs.condition_label,
                            sigma = sqrt(mean(sigma(lmmmodel2$full_model)^2)), # RMS of sigma()
                            edf = df.residual(lmmmodel2$full_model), method = "pairwise"))$upper.CL
  )%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
        caption = c("contrasts for estimated marginal means | by PERI_CON | dv = peripheral SSVEP modulation | corrected: FDR")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))

contrast estimate SE df t.ratio p.value CohensD lowCI highCI
peri_AttIrrel - peri_AttUnatt -1.212 3.415 232 -0.355 0.8915 -0.053 -0.347 0.241
peri_AttIrrel - peri_UnattIrrel 0.467 3.415 232 0.137 0.8915 0.020 -0.273 0.314

# pairs(emmeans(aovmodel2, ~ RDK_isattended))
# pairs(emmeans(aovmodel2, ~ condition_label))

Some post-hoc add on analyses

General post cue amplitudes across all conditions

modulation ~ POSITION


dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_ispresented=="presented")%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_position2, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time == '[0.5 1.5] ')

dat2plot %>%
  group_by(RDK_position2, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(modulation_evoked ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$modulation_evoked, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$modulation_evoked))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$modulation_evoked))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, RDK_position2, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="holm")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
        caption = c("SSVEP | modulation | t-tests for modulation agains zero | Holm-corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
SSVEP | modulation | t-tests for modulation agains zero | Holm-corrected
RDK_colorlum RDK_position2 meanval std statistic parameter p.value BF10 BF01 CohensD
offset_to_bckgrd center 6.676 13.057 2.286 19 0.0339 1.890 0.529 0.511
offset_to_bckgrd peri 6.510 8.669 3.358 19 0.0033 13.051 0.077 0.751
isolum__to_bckgrd center 10.525 9.736 5.921 29 < .001 9388.550 0.000 1.081
isolum__to_bckgrd peri -3.748 10.791 -1.902 29 0.0671 0.949 1.054 -0.347 
dat2plot %>%
  dplyr::select(-amplitude_evoked)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "RDK_position2", values_from = "modulation_evoked")%>%
  mutate(centerMINUSperi = `center` -`peri`)%>%
  group_by(time, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(centerMINUSperi ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$centerMINUSperi, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$centerMINUSperi))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$centerMINUSperi))) %>%
  ungroup()%>%
  dplyr::select(-data, -time) %>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="holm")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("SSVEP | modulation | center - peri ")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
SSVEP | modulation | center - peri
RDK_colorlum meanval std statistic parameter p.value BF10 BF01 CohensD
offset_to_bckgrd 0.166 13.858 0.054 19 0.9578 0.233 4.299 0.012
isolum__to_bckgrd 14.274 15.783 4.953 29 < .001 801.062 0.001 0.904

analysis [displayed differently] | pre-cue differences

pre-cue differences?

amplitude ~ condition

ANOVA_RM: amplitude ~ CONDITION ( attended + irrelevant attended + not attended irrelevant + attended irrelevant + not attended not attended + attended not attended + irrelevant )

  • post-hoc t-test contrasting differences between defined levels
  • post-hoc t-test difference of post-cue modulation for attended vs unattended color


dat2plot <- DataIn %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="peri") %>%
  filter(RDK_ispresented=="presented")%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended2, RDK_colorlum)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time == '[-1 0] ')

dat2plot2 <- DataIn %>%
  mutate(condition2 = case_when(
    (condition == 1 | condition == 2) ~ "peri_att_unatt",
    (condition == 3 | condition == 4) ~ "peri_att_irrel",
    (condition == 5 | condition == 6) ~ "peri_unatt_irrel",
  )) %>%
  filter(RDK_position2=="peri") %>%
  filter(RDK_ispresented=="presented")%>%
  group_by(subjects, time, RDK_isattended, RDK_colorlum, condition2)%>%
  summarise(amplitude_evoked=mean(amplitude_evoked), modulation_evoked=mean(modulation_evoked))%>%
  filter(time == '[-1 0] ')

dat2plot %>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum, time)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats= purrr::map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    anova(aov_ez(id="subjects", dv = "amplitude_evoked", data = ., within = "RDK_isattended2"))
  ))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest()%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(
    `p.value` = cell_spec(ifelse(round(`p.value`,4)<.001,"< .001",round(`p.value`,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),"blue", ifelse(`p.value` < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(`p.value`),F, ifelse(`p.value` < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, term, `num.Df`, `den.Df`, MSE, `statistic`, ges, `p.value`) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("repeated measures ANOVA for peripheral SSVEP amplitudes")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
repeated measures ANOVA for peripheral SSVEP amplitudes
RDK_colorlum term num.Df den.Df MSE statistic ges p.value
offset_to_bckgrd RDK_isattended2 1.753 33.314 0.290 1.093 0.018 0.3396
isolum__to_bckgrd RDK_isattended2 1.144 33.188 1.932 0.166 0.002 0.72 
dat2plot2 %>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum, condition2, RDK_isattended)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(amplitude_evoked ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$amplitude_evoked, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$amplitude_evoked))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$amplitude_evoked))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum,condition2, RDK_isattended, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="holm")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  arrange(RDK_colorlum,condition2,RDK_isattended)%>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), 
        caption = c("peripheral SSVEP | modulation | t-tests for pre-cue amplitudes against zero | Holm-corrected")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
peripheral SSVEP | modulation | t-tests for pre-cue amplitudes against zero | Holm-corrected
RDK_colorlum condition2 RDK_isattended meanval std statistic parameter p.value BF10 BF01 CohensD
isolum__to_bckgrd peri_att_irrel attended 1.780 0.965 10.103 29 < .001 185052829.7 0 1.845
isolum__to_bckgrd peri_att_irrel irrelevant 1.717 0.895 10.509 29 < .001 436903425.7 0 1.919
isolum__to_bckgrd peri_att_unatt attended 1.748 0.892 10.733 29 < .001 696211857.4 0 1.960
isolum__to_bckgrd peri_att_unatt not attended 1.810 0.832 11.919 29 < .001 7477479815.2 0 2.176
isolum__to_bckgrd peri_unatt_irrel irrelevant 1.726 0.933 10.137 29 < .001 199088404.3 0 1.851
isolum__to_bckgrd peri_unatt_irrel not attended 1.843 0.985 10.247 29 < .001 251646596.5 0 1.871
offset_to_bckgrd peri_att_irrel attended 1.171 0.512 10.236 19 < .001 3231874.0 0 2.289
offset_to_bckgrd peri_att_irrel irrelevant 1.010 0.424 10.657 19 < .001 5961364.2 0 2.383
offset_to_bckgrd peri_att_unatt attended 1.141 0.558 9.150 19 < .001 614272.6 0 2.046
offset_to_bckgrd peri_att_unatt not attended 1.185 0.529 10.013 19 < .001 2318984.8 0 2.239
offset_to_bckgrd peri_unatt_irrel irrelevant 1.039 0.489 9.497 19 < .001 1057767.6 0 2.124
offset_to_bckgrd peri_unatt_irrel not attended 1.164 0.569 9.138 19 < .001 602222.5 0 2.043 
dat2plot2 %>%
  dplyr::select(-modulation_evoked)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "RDK_isattended", values_from = "amplitude_evoked")%>%
  mutate(`attended-notattended` = `attended` -`not attended`, 
         `attended-irrelevant` = `attended` -`irrelevant`,
         `notattended-irrelevant` = `not attended` -`irrelevant`)%>%
  dplyr::select(-c(`attended`:`not attended`))%>%
  pivot_longer(cols=`attended-notattended`:`notattended-irrelevant`, names_to = "contrast", values_to = "amplitude")%>%
  drop_na(amplitude)%>%
  group_by(RDK_colorlum, condition2)%>%
  nest()%>%
  mutate(stats = map(data, ~broom::tidy(
    t.test(amplitude ~ 1, data = .)
  ))) %>%
  mutate(
    t_test_bf = map(data, ~{extractBF(ttestBF(x = .$amplitude, data = .,iterations=num.iter,rscale = sqrt(2)/2))})
  )%>%
  mutate(meanval = map(data, ~ mean(.x$amplitude))) %>%
  mutate(std = map(data, ~ sd(.x$amplitude))) %>%
  ungroup()%>%
  dplyr::select(-data) %>%
  unnest(cols = c(stats, t_test_bf, meanval, std))%>%
  mutate(BF10 = bf, BF01 = 1/bf)%>%
  dplyr::select(RDK_colorlum, condition2, meanval, std,  statistic, parameter, p.value, BF10, BF01)%>%
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="holm")) %>% # none, holm
  # mutate(p.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="none")) %>% # none, holm
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(CohensD = `statistic`/sqrt(parameter +1))%>%
  mutate(
    p.value = cell_spec(ifelse(round(p.value,4)<.001,"< .001",round(p.value,4)), 
                        color = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),"blue", ifelse(p.value < .05, "green", "red")),
                        bold = ifelse(is.nan(p.value),F, ifelse(p.value < .05, T,F)),
                        align = "center")
  ) %>%
  kbl(escape = F, digits = c(3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3), caption = c("peripheral SSVEP | pre-cue amplitudes | contrasts")) %>%
  kable_styling("striped", full_width = T, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed", "responsive",font_size = 8))
peripheral SSVEP | pre-cue amplitudes | contrasts
RDK_colorlum condition2 meanval std statistic parameter p.value BF10 BF01 CohensD

isolum__to_bckgrd peri_unatt_irrel 0.117 1.345 0.476 29 0.6376 0.216 4.633 0.087
